int {return this.#adapter.indexField.getValue()}\n    adapter(): AudioEffectDeviceAdapter {return this.#adapter}\n\n    handleEvent(_event: Event): void {}\n\n    processAudio({s0, s1}: Block): void {\n        if (this.#source.isEmpty()) return\n        const source = this.#source.unwrap()\n        const srcL = source.getChannel(0)\n        const srcR = source.getChannel(1)\n        const outL = this.#output.getChannel(0)\n        const outR = this.#output.getChannel(1)\n        const useSidechain = this.#sideChain.nonEmpty()\n        const scL = useSidechain ? this.#sideChain.unwrap().getChannel(0) : srcL\n        const scR = useSidechain ? this.#sideChain.unwrap().getChannel(1) : srcR\n        for (let i = s0; i < s1; i++) {\n            const level = Math.max(Math.abs(scL[i]), Math.abs(scR[i]))\n            if (this.#inpMax <= level) {\n                this.#inpMax = level\n            } else {\n                this.#inpMax *= GateDeviceProcessor.PEAK_DECAY_PER_SAMPLE\n            }\n            if (this.#inpMax >= this.#thresholdGain) {\n                this.#gateOpen = true\n                this.#holdCounter = this.#holdSamples\n            } else if (this.#gateOpen && this.#holdCounter > 0) {\n                this.#holdCounter--\n            } else if (this.#inpMax < this.#returnThresholdGain) {\n                this.#gateOpen = false\n            }\n            const target = this.#inverse !== this.#gateOpen ? 1.0 : 0.0\n            if (target > this.#envelope) {\n                this.#envelope = this.#attackCoeff * this.#envelope + (1.0 - this.#attackCoeff) * target\n            } else {\n                this.#envelope = this.#releaseCoeff * this.#envelope + (1.0 - this.#releaseCoeff) * target\n            }\n            const gain = this.#floorGain + (1.0 - this.#floorGain) * this.#envelope\n            const l = srcL[i] * gain\n            const r = srcR[i] * gain\n            outL[i] = l\n            outR[i] = r\n            const outPeak = Math.max(Math.abs(l), Math.abs(r))\n            if (this.#outMax <= outPeak) {\n                this.#outMax = outPeak\n            } else {\n                this.#outMax *= GateDeviceProcessor.PEAK_DECAY_PER_SAMPLE\n            }\n        }\n\n        this.#peaks.process(outL, outR, s0, s1)\n    }\n\n    parameterChanged(parameter: AutomatableParameter): void {\n        if (parameter === this.parameterInverse) {\n            this.#inverse = this.parameterInverse.getValue()\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterThreshold) {\n            this.#threshold = this.parameterThreshold.getValue()\n            this.#thresholdGain = dbToGain(this.#threshold)\n            this.#returnThresholdGain = dbToGain(this.#threshold - this.#return)\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterReturn) {\n            this.#return = this.parameterReturn.getValue()\n            this.#returnThresholdGain = dbToGain(this.#threshold - this.#return)\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterAttack) {\n            this.#attack = this.parameterAttack.getValue()\n            this.#updateCoefficients()\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterHold) {\n            this.#hold = this.parameterHold.getValue()\n            this.#holdSamples = Math.round(this.#hold * 0.001 * sampleRate) | 0\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterRelease) {\n            this.#release = this.parameterRelease.getValue()\n            this.#updateCoefficients()\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterFloor) {\n            this.#floor = this.parameterFloor.getValue()\n            this.#floorGain = dbToGain(this.#floor)\n        }\n    }\n\n    #updateCoefficients(): void {\n        const attackSeconds = this.#attack * 0.001\n        const releaseSeconds = this.#release * 0.001\n        this.#attackCoeff = Math.exp(-1.0 / (sampleRate * attackSeconds))\n        this.#releaseCoeff = Math.exp(-1.0 / (sampleRate * releaseSeconds))\n        this.#holdSamples = Math.round(this.#hold * 0.001 * sampleRate) | 0\n    }\n\n    toString(): string {return `{${this.constructor.name} (${this.#id})}`}\n}", "import {int, Option, Terminable, UUID} from \"@opendaw/lib-std\"\nimport {AudioEffectDeviceAdapter, CrusherDeviceBoxAdapter} from \"@opendaw/studio-adapters\"\nimport {EngineContext} from \"../../EngineContext\"\nimport {Block, Processor} from \"../../processing\"\nimport {PeakBroadcaster} from \"../../PeakBroadcaster\"\nimport {AutomatableParameter} from \"../../AutomatableParameter\"\nimport {AudioEffectDeviceProcessor} from \"../../AudioEffectDeviceProcessor\"\nimport {AudioBuffer, Crusher, StereoMatrix} from \"@opendaw/lib-dsp\"\nimport {AudioProcessor} from \"../../AudioProcessor\"\n\nexport class CrusherDeviceProcessor extends AudioProcessor implements AudioEffectDeviceProcessor {\n    static ID: int = 0 | 0\n\n    readonly #id: int = CrusherDeviceProcessor.ID++\n\n    readonly #adapter: CrusherDeviceBoxAdapter\n    readonly #output: AudioBuffer\n    readonly #dsp: Crusher\n    readonly #peaks: PeakBroadcaster\n\n    readonly parameterCrusherRate: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterBitDepth: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterBoost: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterMix: AutomatableParameter<number>\n\n    #source: Option<AudioBuffer> = Option.None\n\n    constructor(context: EngineContext, adapter: CrusherDeviceBoxAdapter) {\n        super(context)\n\n        this.#adapter = adapter\n        this.#output = new AudioBuffer()\n        this.#dsp = new Crusher(sampleRate)\n        this.#peaks = this.own(new PeakBroadcaster(context.broadcaster, adapter.address))\n\n        const {crush, bits, boost, mix} = adapter.namedParameter\n        this.parameterCrusherRate = this.own(this.bindParameter(crush))\n        this.parameterBitDepth = this.own(this.bindParameter(bits))\n        this.parameterBoost = this.own(this.bindParameter(boost))\n        this.parameterMix = this.own(this.bindParameter(mix))\n\n        this.ownAll(\n            context.registerProcessor(this),\n            context.audioOutputBufferRegistry.register(adapter.address, this.#output, this.outgoing)\n        )\n        this.readAllParameters()\n    }\n\n    get incoming(): Processor {return this}\n    get outgoing(): Processor {return this}\n\n    reset(): void {\n        this.#dsp.reset()\n        this.#peaks.clear()\n        this.#output.clear()\n        this.eventInput.clear()\n    }\n\n    get uuid(): UUID.Bytes {return this.#adapter.uuid}\n\n    get audioOutput(): AudioBuffer {return this.#output}\n\n    setAudioSource(source: AudioBuffer): Terminable {\n        this.#source = Option.wrap(source)\n        return {terminate: () => this.#source = Option.None}\n    }\n\n    index(): int {return this.#adapter.indexField.getValue()}\n\n    adapter(): AudioEffectDeviceAdapter {return this.#adapter}\n\n    processAudio({s0, s1}: Block): void {\n        if (this.#source.isEmpty()) {return}\n        const input = this.#source.unwrap()\n        this.#dsp.process(\n            input.channels() as StereoMatrix.Channels,\n            this.#output.channels() as StereoMatrix.Channels,\n            s0, s1)\n        this.#peaks.process(\n            this.#output.getChannel(0),\n            this.#output.getChannel(1),\n            s0, s1)\n    }\n\n    parameterChanged(parameter: AutomatableParameter): void {\n        if (parameter === this.parameterCrusherRate) {\n            this.#dsp.setCrush(1.0 - this.parameterCrusherRate.getValue())\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterBitDepth) {\n            this.#dsp.setBitDepth(this.parameterBitDepth.getValue())\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterBoost) {\n            this.#dsp.setBoost(this.parameterBoost.getValue())\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterMix) {\n            this.#dsp.setMix(this.parameterMix.getValue())\n        }\n    }\n\n    toString(): string {return `{${this.constructor.name} (${this.#id})`}\n}", "import {int, Option, Terminable, UUID} from \"@opendaw/lib-std\"\nimport {AudioEffectDeviceAdapter, FoldDeviceBoxAdapter} from \"@opendaw/studio-adapters\"\nimport {EngineContext} from \"../../EngineContext\"\nimport {Block, Processor} from \"../../processing\"\nimport {PeakBroadcaster} from \"../../PeakBroadcaster\"\nimport {AutomatableParameter} from \"../../AutomatableParameter\"\nimport {AudioEffectDeviceProcessor} from \"../../AudioEffectDeviceProcessor\"\nimport {AudioBuffer, dbToGain, Ramp, RenderQuantum, ResamplerStereo, StereoMatrix} from \"@opendaw/lib-dsp\"\nimport {AudioProcessor} from \"../../AudioProcessor\"\n\nconst oversamplingValues = [2, 4, 8] as const\nconst maxOversampleFactor = 8 as const\n\nexport class FoldDeviceProcessor extends AudioProcessor implements AudioEffectDeviceProcessor {\n    static ID: int = 0 | 0\n\n    readonly #id: int = FoldDeviceProcessor.ID++\n\n    readonly #adapter: FoldDeviceBoxAdapter\n    readonly #output: AudioBuffer\n    readonly #buffer: StereoMatrix.Channels\n    readonly #peaks: PeakBroadcaster\n\n    readonly parameterDrive: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterVolume: AutomatableParameter<number>\n\n    #source: Option<AudioBuffer> = Option.None\n    #processed: boolean = false\n\n    // will be set in contructor callback: 'catchupAndSubscribe'\n    #resampler!: ResamplerStereo\n    #oversamplingFactor!: int\n    #smoothInputGain!: Ramp<number>\n    #smoothOutputGain!: Ramp<number>\n\n    constructor(context: EngineContext, adapter: FoldDeviceBoxAdapter) {\n        super(context)\n\n        this.#adapter = adapter\n        this.#output = new AudioBuffer()\n        this.#buffer = [\n            new Float32Array(RenderQuantum * maxOversampleFactor),\n            new Float32Array(RenderQuantum * maxOversampleFactor)]\n        this.#peaks = this.own(new PeakBroadcaster(context.broadcaster, adapter.address))\n\n        const {drive, volume} = adapter.namedParameter\n        this.parameterDrive = this.own(this.bindParameter(drive))\n        this.parameterVolume = this.own(this.bindParameter(volume))\n\n        this.ownAll(\n            context.registerProcessor(this),\n            context.audioOutputBufferRegistry.register(adapter.address, this.#output, this.outgoing),\n            adapter.box.overSampling.catchupAndSubscribe(owner => {\n                const factor = oversamplingValues[owner.getValue()]\n                this.#resampler = new ResamplerStereo(factor)\n                this.#smoothInputGain = Ramp.linear(sampleRate * factor)\n                this.#smoothInputGain.set(dbToGain(this.parameterDrive.getValue()), this.#processed)\n                this.#smoothOutputGain = Ramp.linear(sampleRate * factor)\n                this.#smoothOutputGain.set(dbToGain(this.parameterVolume.getValue()), this.#processed)\n                this.#oversamplingFactor = factor\n            })\n        )\n        this.readAllParameters()\n    }\n\n    get incoming(): Processor {return this}\n    get outgoing(): Processor {return this}\n\n    reset(): void {\n        console.debug(\"reset\")\n        this.#processed = false\n        this.#peaks.clear()\n        this.#output.clear()\n        this.eventInput.clear()\n    }\n\n    get uuid(): UUID.Bytes {return this.#adapter.uuid}\n\n    get audioOutput(): AudioBuffer {return this.#output}\n\n    setAudioSource(source: AudioBuffer): Terminable {\n        this.#source = Option.wrap(source)\n        return {terminate: () => this.#source = Option.None}\n    }\n\n    index(): int {return this.#adapter.indexField.getValue()}\n\n    adapter(): AudioEffectDeviceAdapter {return this.#adapter}\n\n    processAudio({s0, s1}: Block): void {\n        if (this.#source.isEmpty()) {return}\n        this.#resampler.upsample(this.#source.unwrap().channels() as StereoMatrix.Channels, this.#buffer, s0, s1)\n        const oversampledLength = (s1 - s0) * this.#oversamplingFactor\n        const [oversampledL, oversampledR] = this.#buffer\n        if (this.#smoothInputGain.isInterpolating() || this.#smoothOutputGain.isInterpolating()) {\n            for (let i = 0; i < oversampledLength; i++) {\n                const gain = this.#smoothOutputGain.moveAndGet()\n                const amount = this.#smoothInputGain.moveAndGet()\n                const sL = 0.25 * oversampledL[i] * amount + 0.25\n                const sR = 0.25 * oversampledR[i] * amount + 0.25\n                oversampledL[i] = 4.0 * (Math.abs(sL - Math.floor(sL + 0.5)) - 0.25) * gain\n                oversampledR[i] = 4.0 * (Math.abs(sR - Math.floor(sR + 0.5)) - 0.25) * gain\n            }\n        } else {\n            const gain = this.#smoothOutputGain.get()\n            const amount = this.#smoothInputGain.get()\n            for (let i = 0; i < oversampledLength; i++) {\n                const sL = 0.25 * oversampledL[i] * amount + 0.25\n                const sR = 0.25 * oversampledR[i] * amount + 0.25\n                oversampledL[i] = 4.0 * (Math.abs(sL - Math.floor(sL + 0.5)) - 0.25) * gain\n                oversampledR[i] = 4.0 * (Math.abs(sR - Math.floor(sR + 0.5)) - 0.25) * gain\n            }\n        }\n        this.#resampler.downsample(this.#buffer, this.#output.channels() as StereoMatrix.Channels, s0, s1)\n        this.#peaks.process(this.#output.getChannel(0), this.#output.getChannel(1), s0, s1)\n        this.#processed = true\n    }\n\n    parameterChanged(parameter: AutomatableParameter): void {\n        if (parameter === this.parameterDrive) {\n            this.#smoothInputGain.set(dbToGain(this.parameterDrive.getValue()), this.#processed)\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterVolume) {\n            this.#smoothOutputGain.set(dbToGain(this.parameterVolume.getValue()), this.#processed)\n        }\n    }\n\n    toString(): string {return `{${this.constructor.name} (${this.#id})`}\n}", "import {Arrays, asInstanceOf, byte, int, Option, Terminable, UUID} from \"@opendaw/lib-std\"\nimport {AudioBuffer, Event, PPQN} from \"@opendaw/lib-dsp\"\nimport {MIDIOutputDeviceBoxAdapter} from \"@opendaw/studio-adapters\"\nimport {EngineContext} from \"../../EngineContext\"\nimport {AudioProcessor} from \"../../AudioProcessor\"\nimport {Block, Processor} from \"../../processing\"\nimport {AutomatableParameter} from \"../../AutomatableParameter\"\nimport {NoteEventSource, NoteEventTarget, NoteLifecycleEvent} from \"../../NoteEventSource\"\nimport {DeviceProcessor} from \"../../DeviceProcessor\"\nimport {InstrumentDeviceProcessor} from \"../../InstrumentDeviceProcessor\"\nimport {MidiData} from \"@opendaw/lib-midi\"\nimport {MIDIOutputBox, MIDIOutputParameterBox} from \"@opendaw/studio-boxes\"\n\nexport class MIDIOutputDeviceProcessor extends AudioProcessor implements InstrumentDeviceProcessor, NoteEventTarget {\n    readonly #adapter: MIDIOutputDeviceBoxAdapter\n\n    readonly #audioOutput: AudioBuffer\n\n    readonly #activeNotes: Array<byte> = []\n\n    readonly #parameters: Array<AutomatableParameter<number>>\n\n    #lastChannel: byte\n    #enabled: boolean = true\n    #source: Option<NoteEventSource> = Option.None\n\n    constructor(context: EngineContext, adapter: MIDIOutputDeviceBoxAdapter) {\n        super(context)\n\n        this.#adapter = adapter\n        this.#audioOutput = new AudioBuffer()\n        this.#parameters = []\n\n        const {midiDevice, box, parameters} = adapter\n\n        this.#lastChannel = box.channel.getValue()\n\n        this.ownAll(\n            box.enabled.catchupAndSubscribe(owner => {\n                this.#enabled = owner.getValue()\n                if (!this.#enabled) {this.reset()}\n            }),\n            box.parameters.pointerHub.catchupAndSubscribe({\n                onAdded: (({box}) =>\n                    this.#parameters.push(this.bindParameter(\n                        parameters.parameterAt(asInstanceOf(box, MIDIOutputParameterBox).value.address)))),\n                onRemoved: (({box}) =>\n                    Arrays.removeIf(this.#parameters, parameter =>\n                        parameter.address === asInstanceOf(box, MIDIOutputParameterBox).value.address))\n            }),\n            box.channel.subscribe(owner => {\n                midiDevice.ifSome(outputBox => this.#activeNotes.forEach(pitch =>\n                    context.sendMIDIData(outputBox.id.getValue(),\n                        MidiData.noteOff(this.#lastChannel, pitch), outputBox.delayInMs.getValue())))\n                this.#activeNotes.length = 0\n                this.#lastChannel = owner.getValue()\n            }),\n            context.registerProcessor(this)\n        )\n        this.readAllParameters()\n    }\n\n    get noteEventTarget(): Option<NoteEventTarget & DeviceProcessor> {return Option.wrap(this)}\n\n    introduceBlock({p0, p1, s0, flags, bpm}: Block): void {\n        if (this.#source.isEmpty() || !this.#enabled) {return}\n        const {box: {channel, device}} = this.#adapter\n        const optDevice = device.targetVertex.match({\n            none: () => Option.None,\n            some: ({box}) => Option.wrap(asInstanceOf(box, MIDIOutputBox))\n        })\n        const delayInMs = optDevice.mapOr(box => box.delayInMs.getValue(), 0)\n        for (const event of this.#source.unwrap().processNotes(p0, p1, flags)) {\n            if (event.pitch >= 0 && event.pitch <= 127) {\n                const blockOffsetInSeconds = s0 / sampleRate\n                const eventOffsetInSeconds = PPQN.pulsesToSeconds(event.position - p0, bpm)\n                const relativeTimeInMs = (blockOffsetInSeconds + eventOffsetInSeconds) * 1000.0 + delayInMs\n                const channelIndex = channel.getValue()\n                if (NoteLifecycleEvent.isStart(event)) {\n                    const velocityAsByte = Math.round(event.velocity * 127)\n                    this.#activeNotes.push(event.pitch)\n                    optDevice.ifSome(device => this.context.sendMIDIData(device.id.getValue(),\n                        MidiData.noteOn(channelIndex, event.pitch, velocityAsByte), relativeTimeInMs))\n                } else if (NoteLifecycleEvent.isStop(event)) {\n                    const deleteIndex = this.#activeNotes.indexOf(event.pitch)\n                    if (deleteIndex > -1) {this.#activeNotes.splice(deleteIndex, 1)}\n                    optDevice.ifSome(optDevice => this.context.sendMIDIData(optDevice.id.getValue(),\n                        MidiData.noteOff(channelIndex, event.pitch), relativeTimeInMs))\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    setNoteEventSource(source: NoteEventSource): Terminable {\n        this.#source = Option.wrap(source)\n        return Terminable.create(() => this.#source = Option.None)\n    }\n\n    get incoming(): Processor {return this}\n    get outgoing(): Processor {return this}\n\n    reset(): void {}\n\n    get uuid(): UUID.Bytes {return this.#adapter.uuid}\n    get audioOutput(): AudioBuffer {return this.#audioOutput}\n    get adapter(): MIDIOutputDeviceBoxAdapter {return this.#adapter}\n\n    handleEvent(_event: Event): void {}\n    processAudio(_block: Block): void {}\n\n    parameterChanged(parameter: AutomatableParameter, relativeBlockTime: number = 0.0): void {\n        const {box: {channel, device}} = this.#adapter\n        if (device.isEmpty() || !this.#enabled) {return}\n        const {id, delayInMs} = asInstanceOf(device.targetVertex.unwrap(\"device.target\").box, MIDIOutputBox)\n        const relativeTimeInMs = relativeBlockTime * 1000.0 * delayInMs.getValue()\n        const controllerId = asInstanceOf(parameter.adapter.field.box, MIDIOutputParameterBox).controller.getValue()\n        const velocityAsByte = Math.round(parameter.getValue() * 127)\n        const data = MidiData.control(channel.getValue(), controllerId, velocityAsByte)\n        this.context.sendMIDIData(id.getValue(), data, relativeTimeInMs)\n    }\n\n    finishProcess(): void {}\n\n    toString(): string {return `{MIDIOutputDeviceProcessor}`}\n}", "import {assert, int, Objects, Option, Terminable, UUID} from \"@opendaw/lib-std\"\nimport {NoteBroadcaster, VelocityDeviceBoxAdapter} from \"@opendaw/studio-adapters\"\nimport {Event, NoteEvent, ppqn} from \"@opendaw/lib-dsp\"\nimport {EngineContext} from \"../../EngineContext\"\nimport {EventProcessor} from \"../../EventProcessor\"\nimport {Block, Processor} from \"../../processing\"\nimport {AutomatableParameter} from \"../../AutomatableParameter\"\nimport {NoteEventSource, NoteLifecycleEvent} from \"../../NoteEventSource\"\nimport {MidiEffectProcessor} from \"../../MidiEffectProcessor\"\n\nexport class VelocityDeviceProcessor extends EventProcessor implements MidiEffectProcessor {\n    readonly #adapter: VelocityDeviceBoxAdapter\n\n    readonly #noteBroadcaster: NoteBroadcaster\n    readonly #velocities: Int32Array<ArrayBuffer>\n\n    #source: Option<NoteEventSource> = Option.None\n    #velocityIndex: int\n\n    constructor(context: EngineContext, adapter: VelocityDeviceBoxAdapter) {\n        super(context)\n\n        this.#adapter = adapter\n\n        this.#noteBroadcaster = this.own(new NoteBroadcaster(context.broadcaster, adapter.address))\n        this.#velocities = new Int32Array(1024)\n        this.#velocityIndex = 0 | 0\n\n        const {magnetPosition, magnetStrength, randomSeed, randomAmount, offset, mix} = adapter.namedParameter\n        this.ownAll(\n            this.bindParameter(magnetPosition),\n            this.bindParameter(magnetStrength),\n            this.bindParameter(randomSeed),\n            this.bindParameter(randomAmount),\n            this.bindParameter(offset),\n            this.bindParameter(mix),\n            context.broadcaster.broadcastIntegers(adapter.address.append(0), this.#velocities, (_hasSubscribers) => {\n                this.#velocities[this.#velocityIndex] = 0\n                this.#velocityIndex = 0\n            }),\n            context.registerProcessor(this)\n        )\n        this.readAllParameters()\n    }\n\n    setNoteEventSource(source: NoteEventSource): Terminable {\n        assert(this.#source.isEmpty(), \"NoteEventSource already set\")\n        this.#source = Option.wrap(source)\n        return Terminable.create(() => this.#source = Option.None)\n    }\n\n    get uuid(): UUID.Bytes {return this.#adapter.uuid}\n    get incoming(): Processor {return this}\n    get outgoing(): Processor {return this}\n\n    * processNotes(from: ppqn, to: ppqn, flags: int): IterableIterator<NoteLifecycleEvent> {\n        if (this.#source.isEmpty()) {return}\n        for (const event of this.#source.unwrap().processNotes(from, to, flags)) {\n            if (NoteLifecycleEvent.isStart(event)) {\n                this.#noteBroadcaster.noteOn(event.pitch)\n                const velocity = this.#adapter.computeVelocity(event.position, event.velocity)\n                this.#velocities[this.#velocityIndex++] =\n                    Math.round(event.velocity * 127) | (Math.round(velocity * 127) << 8) | (1 << 16) // last byte keep reading\n                yield Objects.overwrite(event, {velocity})\n            } else {\n                this.#noteBroadcaster.noteOff(event.pitch)\n                yield event\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    * iterateActiveNotesAt(position: ppqn, onlyExternal: boolean): IterableIterator<NoteEvent> {\n        if (this.#source.isEmpty()) {return}\n        for (const event of this.#source.unwrap().iterateActiveNotesAt(position, onlyExternal)) {\n            if (event.type === \"note-event\") {\n                yield Objects.overwrite(event, {\n                    velocity: this.#adapter.computeVelocity(event.position, event.velocity)\n                })\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    reset(): void {this.eventInput.clear()}\n\n    processEvents(_block: Block, _from: ppqn, _to: ppqn): void {}\n\n    parameterChanged(_parameter: AutomatableParameter): void {}\n\n    handleEvent(_block: Block, _event: Event): void {}\n\n    index(): number {return this.#adapter.indexField.getValue()}\n    adapter(): VelocityDeviceBoxAdapter {return this.#adapter}\n}", "import {Bits, int, Option, Terminable, UUID} from \"@opendaw/lib-std\"\nimport {TidalDeviceBoxAdapter} from \"@opendaw/studio-adapters\"\nimport {EngineContext} from \"../../EngineContext\"\nimport {Block, BlockFlag, Processor} from \"../../processing\"\nimport {PeakBroadcaster} from \"../../PeakBroadcaster\"\nimport {AutomatableParameter} from \"../../AutomatableParameter\"\nimport {AudioEffectDeviceProcessor} from \"../../AudioEffectDeviceProcessor\"\nimport {AudioBuffer, Fraction, PPQN, Smooth, TidalComputer} from \"@opendaw/lib-dsp\"\nimport {AudioProcessor} from \"../../AudioProcessor\"\n\nexport class TidalDeviceProcessor extends AudioProcessor implements AudioEffectDeviceProcessor {\n    static ID: int = 0 | 0\n\n    readonly #id: int = TidalDeviceProcessor.ID++\n\n    readonly #adapter: TidalDeviceBoxAdapter\n    readonly #output: AudioBuffer\n    readonly #peaks: PeakBroadcaster\n    readonly #computer: TidalComputer\n    readonly #smoothGainL: Smooth\n    readonly #smoothGainR: Smooth\n\n    readonly #pRate: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly #pDepth: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly #pSlope: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly #pSymmetry: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly #pOffset: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly #pChannelOffset: AutomatableParameter<number>\n\n    #source: Option<AudioBuffer> = Option.None\n    #needsUpdate: boolean = true\n    #phase: number = 0.0\n\n    constructor(context: EngineContext, adapter: TidalDeviceBoxAdapter) {\n        super(context)\n\n        this.#adapter = adapter\n        this.#output = new AudioBuffer()\n        this.#peaks = this.own(new PeakBroadcaster(context.broadcaster, adapter.address))\n        this.#computer = new TidalComputer()\n        this.#smoothGainL = new Smooth(0.003, sampleRate)\n        this.#smoothGainR = new Smooth(0.003, sampleRate)\n\n        const {rate, depth, slope, symmetry, offset, channelOffset} = adapter.namedParameter\n\n        this.#pRate = this.bindParameter(rate)\n        this.#pDepth = this.bindParameter(depth)\n        this.#pSlope = this.bindParameter(slope)\n        this.#pSymmetry = this.bindParameter(symmetry)\n        this.#pOffset = this.bindParameter(offset)\n        this.#pChannelOffset = this.bindParameter(channelOffset)\n\n        this.ownAll(\n            context.broadcaster.broadcastFloat(adapter.address.append(0), () => this.#phase),\n            context.registerProcessor(this),\n            context.audioOutputBufferRegistry.register(adapter.address, this.#output, this.outgoing)\n        )\n        this.readAllParameters()\n    }\n\n    get incoming(): Processor {return this}\n    get outgoing(): Processor {return this}\n\n    reset(): void {\n        this.#phase = 0.0\n        this.#needsUpdate = true\n        this.#peaks.clear()\n        this.#output.clear()\n        this.eventInput.clear()\n    }\n\n    get uuid(): UUID.Bytes {return this.#adapter.uuid}\n\n    get audioOutput(): AudioBuffer {return this.#output}\n\n    setAudioSource(source: AudioBuffer): Terminable {\n        this.#source = Option.wrap(source)\n        return {terminate: () => this.#source = Option.None}\n    }\n\n    index(): int {return this.#adapter.indexField.getValue()}\n    adapter(): TidalDeviceBoxAdapter {return this.#adapter}\n\n    processAudio({p0, s0, s1, bpm, flags}: Block): void {\n        if (this.#source.isEmpty()) {return}\n        const input = this.#source.unwrap()\n        const [inpL, inpR] = input.channels()\n        const [outL, outR] = this.#output.channels()\n        if (this.#needsUpdate) {\n            this.#computer.set(this.#pDepth.getValue(), this.#pSlope.getValue(), this.#pSymmetry.getValue())\n            this.#needsUpdate = false\n        }\n        const {RateFractions} = TidalDeviceBoxAdapter\n        const delta = PPQN.samplesToPulses(1, bpm, sampleRate)\n        const ratePulses = Fraction.toPPQN(RateFractions[this.#pRate.getValue()])\n        const rateInvPulses = 1.0 / ratePulses\n        const offset0 = this.#pOffset.getValue() / 360.0\n        const offset1 = offset0 + this.#pChannelOffset.getValue() / 360.0\n        for (let i = s0; i < s1; i++) {\n            const phaseL = (p0 + i * delta) * rateInvPulses + offset0\n            const phaseR = (p0 + i * delta) * rateInvPulses + offset1\n            outL[i] = inpL[i] * this.#smoothGainL.process(this.#computer.compute(phaseL - Math.floor(phaseL)))\n            outR[i] = inpR[i] * this.#smoothGainR.process(this.#computer.compute(phaseR - Math.floor(phaseR)))\n        }\n        this.#peaks.process(outL, outR)\n        if (Bits.every(flags, BlockFlag.transporting | BlockFlag.playing)) {\n            this.#phase = (p0 + (s1 - s0) * delta) * rateInvPulses\n        }\n    }\n\n    parameterChanged(parameter: AutomatableParameter): void {\n        if (parameter === this.#pDepth || parameter === this.#pSlope || parameter === this.#pSymmetry) {\n            this.#needsUpdate = true\n        }\n    }\n\n    toString(): string {return `{${this.constructor.name} (${this.#id})`}\n}", "import {float, int, nextPowOf2} from \"@opendaw/lib-std\"\nimport {StereoMatrix} from \"@opendaw/lib-dsp\"\n\n// https://github.com/khoin/DattorroReverbNode\n// https://ccrma.stanford.edu/~dattorro/EffectDesignPart1.pdf\n\nexport class DattorroReverbDsp {\n    readonly #sampleRate: float\n    readonly #delayBuffers: Float32Array[]\n    readonly #delayLengths: Int32Array\n    readonly #delayWrites: Int32Array\n    readonly #delayReads: Int32Array\n    readonly #delayMasks: Int32Array\n    readonly #preDelayBuffer: Float32Array\n    readonly #preDelayMask: int\n    readonly #taps: Int16Array\n\n    #preDelayWrite = 0 | 0\n    #lp1 = 0.0\n    #lp2 = 0.0\n    #lp3 = 0.0\n    #excPhase = 0.0\n    #preDelay = 0\n    #bandwidth = 0.9999\n    #inputDiffusion1 = 0.75\n    #inputDiffusion2 = 0.625\n    #decay = 0.5\n    #decayDiffusion1 = 0.7\n    #decayDiffusion2 = 0.5\n    #damping = 0.005\n    #excursionRate = 0.5\n    #excursionDepth = 0.7\n    #wet = 0.3\n    #dry = 0.6\n\n    constructor(sampleRate: float) {\n        this.#sampleRate = sampleRate\n        const preDelaySize = nextPowOf2(sampleRate + 1)\n        this.#preDelayBuffer = new Float32Array(preDelaySize)\n        this.#preDelayMask = preDelaySize - 1\n        const delayTimes = [\n            0.004771345, 0.003595309, 0.012734787, 0.009307483,\n            0.022579886, 0.149625349, 0.060481839, 0.1249958,\n            0.030509727, 0.141695508, 0.089244313, 0.106280031\n        ]\n        const numDelays = delayTimes.length\n        this.#delayBuffers = new Array(numDelays)\n        this.#delayLengths = new Int32Array(numDelays)\n        this.#delayWrites = new Int32Array(numDelays)\n        this.#delayReads = new Int32Array(numDelays)\n        this.#delayMasks = new Int32Array(numDelays)\n        delayTimes.forEach((time, index) => {\n            const len = Math.round(time * sampleRate)\n            const size = nextPowOf2(len)\n            this.#delayBuffers[index] = new Float32Array(size)\n            this.#delayLengths[index] = len - 1\n            this.#delayWrites[index] = len - 1\n            this.#delayReads[index] = 0\n            this.#delayMasks[index] = size - 1\n        })\n        const tapTimes = [\n            0.008937872, 0.099929438, 0.064278754, 0.067067639, 0.066866033, 0.006283391, 0.035818689,\n            0.011861161, 0.121870905, 0.041262054, 0.08981553, 0.070931756, 0.011256342, 0.004065724\n        ]\n        this.#taps = Int16Array.from(tapTimes, time => Math.round(time * sampleRate))\n    }\n\n    set preDelayMs(ms: float) {this.#preDelay = Math.floor((ms / 1000) * this.#sampleRate)}\n    set bandwidth(value: float) {this.#bandwidth = value * 0.9999}\n    set inputDiffusion1(value: float) {this.#inputDiffusion1 = value}\n    set inputDiffusion2(value: float) {this.#inputDiffusion2 = value}\n    set decay(value: float) {this.#decay = value}\n    set decayDiffusion1(value: float) {this.#decayDiffusion1 = value * 0.999999}\n    set decayDiffusion2(value: float) {this.#decayDiffusion2 = value * 0.999999}\n    set damping(value: float) {this.#damping = value}\n    set excursionRate(value: float) {this.#excursionRate = value * 2.0}\n    set excursionDepth(value: float) {this.#excursionDepth = value * 2.0}\n    set wetGain(value: float) {this.#wet = value}\n    set dryGain(value: float) {this.#dry = value}\n\n    reset(): void {\n        this.#preDelayBuffer.fill(0)\n        this.#delayBuffers.forEach(buffer => buffer.fill(0))\n        this.#preDelayWrite = 0\n        this.#lp1 = 0.0\n        this.#lp2 = 0.0\n        this.#lp3 = 0.0\n        this.#excPhase = 0.0\n    }\n\n    process(input: StereoMatrix.Channels, output: StereoMatrix.Channels, fromIndex: int, toIndex: int): void {\n        const pd = this.#preDelay\n        const bw = this.#bandwidth\n        const fi = this.#inputDiffusion1\n        const si = this.#inputDiffusion2\n        const dc = this.#decay\n        const ft = this.#decayDiffusion1\n        const st = this.#decayDiffusion2\n        const dp = 1.0 - this.#damping\n        const ex = this.#excursionRate / this.#sampleRate\n        const ed = this.#excursionDepth * this.#sampleRate / 1000.0\n        const we = this.#wet * 0.6\n        const dr = this.#dry\n        const inpChL = input[0]\n        const inpChR = input[1]\n        const outChL = output[0]\n        const outChR = output[1]\n        const pdBuf = this.#preDelayBuffer\n        const pdMask = this.#preDelayMask\n        const db = this.#delayBuffers\n        const dw = this.#delayWrites\n        const drd = this.#delayReads\n        const dm = this.#delayMasks\n        const taps = this.#taps\n        const db0 = db[0], db1 = db[1], db2 = db[2], db3 = db[3]\n        const db4 = db[4], db5 = db[5], db6 = db[6], db7 = db[7]\n        const db8 = db[8], db9 = db[9], db10 = db[10], db11 = db[11]\n        const dm0 = dm[0], dm1 = dm[1], dm2 = dm[2], dm3 = dm[3]\n        const dm4 = dm[4], dm5 = dm[5], dm6 = dm[6], dm7 = dm[7]\n        const dm8 = dm[8], dm9 = dm[9], dm10 = dm[10], dm11 = dm[11]\n        let pdw = this.#preDelayWrite\n        let lp1 = this.#lp1, lp2 = this.#lp2, lp3 = this.#lp3\n        let excPhase = this.#excPhase\n        for (let i = fromIndex; i < toIndex; i++) {\n            const inpL = inpChL[i]\n            const inpR = inpChR[i]\n            pdBuf[pdw] = (inpL + inpR) * 0.5\n            outChL[i] = inpL * dr\n            outChR[i] = inpR * dr\n            const delayedInput = pdBuf[(pdw - pd) & pdMask]\n            lp1 += bw * (delayedInput - lp1)\n            let pre = db0[dw[0]] = lp1 - fi * db0[drd[0]]\n            pre = db1[dw[1]] = fi * (pre - db1[drd[1]]) + db0[drd[0]]\n            pre = db2[dw[2]] = fi * pre + db1[drd[1]] - si * db2[drd[2]]\n            pre = db3[dw[3]] = si * (pre - db3[drd[3]]) + db2[drd[2]]\n            const split = si * pre + db3[drd[3]]\n            const exc = ed * (1 + Math.cos(excPhase * 6.28))\n            const exc2 = ed * (1 + Math.sin(excPhase * 6.2847))\n            const r4exc = exc - ~~exc\n            let r4int = ~~exc + drd[4] - 1\n            const r4x0 = db4[r4int++ & dm4], r4x1 = db4[r4int++ & dm4]\n            const r4x2 = db4[r4int++ & dm4], r4x3 = db4[r4int & dm4]\n            const readC4 = (((3.0 * (r4x1 - r4x2) - r4x0 + r4x3) * 0.5 * r4exc\n                + 2.0 * r4x2 + r4x0 - (5 * r4x1 + r4x3) * 0.5) * r4exc\n                + (r4x2 - r4x0) * 0.5) * r4exc + r4x1\n            let temp = db4[dw[4]] = split + dc * db11[drd[11]] + ft * readC4\n            db5[dw[5]] = readC4 - ft * temp\n            lp2 += dp * (db5[drd[5]] - lp2)\n            temp = db6[dw[6]] = dc * lp2 - st * db6[drd[6]]\n            db7[dw[7]] = db6[drd[6]] + st * temp\n            const r8exc = exc2 - ~~exc2\n            let r8int = ~~exc2 + drd[8] - 1\n            const r8x0 = db8[r8int++ & dm8], r8x1 = db8[r8int++ & dm8]\n            const r8x2 = db8[r8int++ & dm8], r8x3 = db8[r8int & dm8]\n            const readC8 = (((3.0 * (r8x1 - r8x2) - r8x0 + r8x3) * 0.5 * r8exc\n                + 2.0 * r8x2 + r8x0 - (5 * r8x1 + r8x3) * 0.5) * r8exc\n                + (r8x2 - r8x0) * 0.5) * r8exc + r8x1\n            temp = db8[dw[8]] = split + dc * db7[drd[7]] + ft * readC8\n            db9[dw[9]] = readC8 - ft * temp\n            lp3 += dp * (db9[drd[9]] - lp3)\n            temp = db10[dw[10]] = dc * lp3 - st * db10[drd[10]]\n            db11[dw[11]] = db10[drd[10]] + st * temp\n            const lo = db9[(drd[9] + taps[0]) & dm9] + db9[(drd[9] + taps[1]) & dm9] -\n                db10[(drd[10] + taps[2]) & dm10] + db11[(drd[11] + taps[3]) & dm11] -\n                db5[(drd[5] + taps[4]) & dm5] - db6[(drd[6] + taps[5]) & dm6] -\n                db7[(drd[7] + taps[6]) & dm7]\n            const ro = db5[(drd[5] + taps[7]) & dm5] + db5[(drd[5] + taps[8]) & dm5] -\n                db6[(drd[6] + taps[9]) & dm6] + db7[(drd[7] + taps[10]) & dm7] -\n                db9[(drd[9] + taps[11]) & dm9] - db10[(drd[10] + taps[12]) & dm10] -\n                db11[(drd[11] + taps[13]) & dm11]\n            outChL[i] += lo * we\n            outChR[i] += ro * we\n            excPhase += ex\n            pdw = (pdw + 1) & pdMask\n            for (let d = 0; d < 12; d++) {\n                dw[d] = (dw[d] + 1) & dm[d]\n                drd[d] = (drd[d] + 1) & dm[d]\n            }\n        }\n        this.#preDelayWrite = pdw\n        this.#lp1 = lp1\n        this.#lp2 = lp2\n        this.#lp3 = lp3\n        this.#excPhase = excPhase\n    }\n}\n", "import {AudioEffectDeviceAdapter, DattorroReverbDeviceBoxAdapter} from \"@opendaw/studio-adapters\"\nimport {int, Option, Terminable, UUID} from \"@opendaw/lib-std\"\nimport readonly parameterPreDelay: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterBandwidth: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterInputDiffusion1: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterInputDiffusion2: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterDecay: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterDecayDiffusion1: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterDecayDiffusion2: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterDamping: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterExcursionRate: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterExcursionDepth: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterWet: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterDry: AutomatableParameter<number>\n\n    readonly #dsp: DattorroReverbDsp\n\n    readonly #output: AudioBuffer\n    readonly #peaks: PeakBroadcaster\n\n    #source: Option<AudioBuffer> = Option.None\n\n    constructor(context: EngineContext, adapter: DattorroReverbDeviceBoxAdapter) {\n        super(context)\n\n        this.#adapter = adapter\n        this.#output = new AudioBuffer()\n        this.#peaks = this.own(new this.own(this.bindParameter(inputDiffusion1))\n        this.parameterInputDiffusion2 = this.own(this.bindParameter(inputDiffusion2))\n        this.parameterDecay = this.own(this.bindParameter(decay))\n        this.parameterDecayDiffusion1 = this.own(this.bindParameter(decayDiffusion1))\n        this.parameterDecayDiffusion2 = this.parameterDry = this.own(this.bindParameter(dry))\n\n        this.ownAll(\n            context.registerProcessor(this),\n            context.audioOutputBufferRegistry.register(adapter.address, this.#output, this.outgoing)\n        )\n        this.readAllParameters()\n    }\n\n    get incoming(): Processor {return this}\n    get outgoing(): Processor {return this}\n\n    reset(): void {\n audioOutput(): AudioBuffer {return this.#output}\n\n    setAudioSource(source: AudioBuffer): Terminable {\n        this.#source = Option.wrap(source)\n        return {terminate: () => this.#source = Option.None}\n    }\n\n    index(): int {return this.#adapter.indexField.getValue()}\n    adapter(): AudioEffectDeviceAdapter {return this.#adapter}\n\n    handleEvent(_event: Event): void {}\n\n this.#dsp.decayDiffusion2 = this.parameterDecayDiffusion2.getValue()\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterDamping) {\n            this.#dsp.damping = this.parameterDamping.getValue()\n \"@opendaw/nam-wasm\"\n\nexport class NeuralAmpDeviceProcessor extends AudioProcessor implements AudioEffectDeviceProcessor {\n    static ID: int = 0 | 0\n\n    // Singleton WASM module - shared across all instances\n    static #wasmModule: Option<NamWasmModule> = Option.None\n    static #wasmLoading: Nullable<Promise<NamWasmModule>> = null\n\n    static async fetchWasm(engineToClient: return this.#wasmLoading\n        }\n        this.#wasmLoading = (async () => {\n            const wasmBinary = await engineToClient.fetchNamWasm()\n            const emscriptenModule = await createNamModule({\n                wasmBinary,\n                locateFile: () => \"\" // Prevent URL usage in worklet context\n            })\n            const module = NamWasmModule.fromModule(emscriptenModule)\n            module.setSampleRate(sampleRate)\n            this.#wasmModule = Option.wrap(module)\n            this.#wasmLoading = null\n            return module\n        })()\n        return this.#wasmLoading\n    }\n\n    readonly #id: int = NeuralAmpDeviceProcessor.ID++\n    readonly #context: EngineContext\n    readonly #adapter: AutomatableParameter<number>\n\n    readonly #output: AudioBuffer\n    readonly #peaks: PeakBroadcaster\n    readonly #audioAnalyser: AudioAnalyser\n    readonly #spectrum: Float32Array\n    readonly #inputs: [Float32Array, Float32Array]\n    readonly #outputs: [Float32Array, Float32Array]\n\n    #needsSpectrum: boolean = false\n    #pendingModelJson: string = \"\"\n    #source: Option<AudioBuffer> = Option.None\n    #instances: [int, int] = [-1, -1]\n    #modelLoaded: boolean = false\n    #inputGain: number = 1.0\n    #outputGain: number = 1.0\n    #mono: boolean = true\n    #mix: number = 1.0\n    #terminated: boolean = false\n\n    constructor(context: EngineContext, adapter: NeuralAmpDeviceBoxAdapter) {\n        super(context)\n        this.#context = context\n        this.#adapter = adapter\n        this.#output = new AudioBuffer()\n        this.#peaks = this.own(new PeakBroadcaster(context.broadcaster, adapter.address))\n        this.#audioAnalyser = new AudioAnalyser({decay: 0.96})\n        this.#spectrum = new Float32Array(this.#audioAnalyser.numBins())\n        this.#inputs = [new Float32Array(RenderQuantum), new Float32Array(RenderQuantum)]\n        this.#outputs = [new Float32Array(RenderQuantum), new Float32Array(RenderQuantum)]\n        const {namedParameter} = adapter\n        this.parameterInputGain = this.own(this.bindParameter(namedParameter.inputGain))\n        this.parameterOutputGain = this.own(this.bindParameter(namedParameter.outputGain))\n        this.parameterMix = this.own(this.bindParameter(namedParameter.mix))\n        this.ownAll(\n            context.registerProcessor(this),\n            context.audioOutputBufferRegistry.register(adapter.address, this.#output, this.outgoing),\n            adapter.modelField.catchupAndSubscribe(() => this.#onModelChanged()),\n            adapter.monoField.catchupAndSubscribe(field => this.#onMonoChanged(field.getValue())),\n            context.broadcaster.broadcastFloats(adapter.spectrum, this.#spectrum, (hasSubscribers) => {\n                this.#needsSpectrum = hasSubscribers\n                if (!hasSubscribers) {return}\n                this.#spectrum.set(this.#audioAnalyser.bins())\n                this.#audioAnalyser.decay = true\n            })\n        )\n        this.#initInstance()\n        this.readAllParameters()\n        const initialModelJson = adapter.getModelJson()\n        if (initialModelJson.length > 0) {\n            context.awaitResource(NeuralAmpDeviceProcessor.fetchWasm(context.engineToClient))\n        }\n    }\n\n    get incoming(): Processor {return this}\n    get outgoing(): Processor {return this}\n\n    reset(): void {\n        this.#output.clear()\n        this.#peaks.clear()\n        this.eventInput.clear()\n        if (this.#terminated) {return}\n        const module = NeuralAmpDeviceProcessor.#wasmModule\n        if (module.nonEmpty()) {\n            const wasm = module.unwrap()\n            for (const instance of this.#instances) {\n                if (instance >= 0) {\n                    try {\n                        wasm.reset(instance)\n                    } catch (error) {\n                        console.error(\"NAM reset failed:\", error)\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    get uuid(): UUID.Bytes {return this.#adapter.uuid}\n    get audioOutput(): AudioBuffer {return this.#output}\n\n    setAudioSource(source: AudioBuffer): Terminable {\n        this.#source = Option.wrap(source)\n        return {terminate: () => this.#source = Option.None}\n    }\n\n    index(): int {return this.#adapter.indexField.getValue()}\n    adapter(): NeuralAmpDeviceBoxAdapter {return this.#adapter}\n\n    handleEvent(_event: Event): void {}\n\n    processAudio({s0, s1}: Block): void {\n        if (this.#terminated || this.#source.isEmpty()) {return}\n        const [inL, inR] = this.#source.unwrap().channels() as StereoMatrix.Channels\n        const [outL, outR] = this.#output.channels() as StereoMatrix.Channels\n        const numFrames = s1 - s0\n        const module = NeuralAmpDeviceProcessor.#wasmModule\n        if (module.isEmpty() || !this.#modelLoaded || this.#instances[0] < 0) {\n            for (let i = s0; i < s1; i++) {\n                outL[i] = inL[i]\n                outR[i] = inR[i]\n            }\n            this.#peaks.process(outL, outR, s0, s1)\n            return\n        }\n        const wasm = module.unwrap()\n        const [bufInL, bufInR] = this.#inputs\n        const [bufOutL, bufOutR] = this.#outputs\n        const [instanceL, instanceR] = this.#instances\n        const inputGain = this.#inputGain\n        const outputGain = this.#outputGain\n        const wet = this.#mix\n        const dry = 1.0 - wet\n        if (this.#mono) {\n            for (let i = 0; i < numFrames; i++) {\n                bufInL[i] = (inL[s0 + i] + inR[s0 + i]) * 0.5 * inputGain\n            }\n            wasm.process(instanceL, bufInL.subarray(0, numFrames), bufOutL.subarray(0, numFrames))\n            for (let i = 0; i < numFrames; i++) {\n                const wetSample = bufOutL[i] * outputGain\n                outL[s0 + i] = inL[s0 + i] * dry + wetSample * wet\n                outR[s0 + i] = inR[s0 + i] * dry + wetSample * wet\n            }\n        } else {\n            for (let i = 0; i < numFrames; i++) {\n                bufInL[i] = inL[s0 + i] * inputGain\n                bufInR[i] = inR[s0 + i] * inputGain\n            }\n            wasm.process(instanceL, bufInL.subarray(0, numFrames), bufOutL.subarray(0, numFrames))\n            wasm.process(instanceR, bufInR.subarray(0, numFrames), bufOutR.subarray(0, numFrames))\n            for (let i = 0; i < numFrames; i++) {\n                outL[s0 + i] = inL[s0 + i] * dry + bufOutL[i] * outputGain * wet\n                outR[s0 + i] = inR[s0 + i] * dry + bufOutR[i] * outputGain * wet\n            }\n        }\n        this.#peaks.process(outL, outR, s0, s1)\n        if (this.#needsSpectrum) {\n            this.#audioAnalyser.process(outL, outR, s0, s1)\n        }\n    }\n\n    parameterChanged(parameter: AutomatableParameter): void {\n        if (parameter === this.parameterInputGain) {\n            this.#inputGain = dbToGain(this.parameterInputGain.getValue())\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterOutputGain) {\n            this.#outputGain = dbToGain(this.parameterOutputGain.getValue())\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterMix) {\n            this.#mix = this.parameterMix.getValue()\n        }\n    }\n\n    terminate(): void {\n        this.#terminated = true\n        super.terminate()\n        this.#destroyInstances()\n    }\n\n    toString(): string {return `{${this.constructor.name} (${this.#id})}`}\n\n    #initInstance(): void {\n        const module = NeuralAmpDeviceProcessor.#wasmModule\n        if (module.nonEmpty()) {\n            const wasm = module.unwrap()\n            if (this.#instances[0] < 0) {\n                this.#instances[0] = wasm.createInstance()\n            }\n            if (!this.#mono && this.#instances[1] < 0) {\n                this.#instances[1] = wasm.createInstance()\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    #destroyInstances(): void {\n        const module = NeuralAmpDeviceProcessor.#wasmModule\n        if (module.nonEmpty()) {\n            const wasm = module.unwrap()\n            for (let i = 0; i < 2; i++) {\n                if (this.#instances[i] >= 0) {\n                    try {\n                        wasm.unloadModel(this.#instances[i])\n                        wasm.destroyInstance(this.#instances[i])\n                    } catch (error) {\n                        console.error(\"NAM destroyInstance failed:\", error)\n                    }\n                    this.#instances[i] = -1\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        this.#modelLoaded = false\n    }\n\n    #onMonoChanged(mono: boolean): void {\n        if (this.#terminated) {return}\n        this.#mono = mono\n        const module = NeuralAmpDeviceProcessor.#wasmModule\n        if (module.isEmpty()) {return}\n        const wasm = module.unwrap()\n        if (mono) {\n            if (this.#instances[1] >= 0) {\n                try {\n                    wasm.unloadModel(this.#instances[1])\n                    wasm.destroyInstance(this.#instances[1])\n                } catch (error) {\n                    console.error(\"NAM destroyInstance failed in onMonoChanged:\", error)\n                }\n                this.#instances[1] = -1\n            }\n        } else {\n            if (this.#instances[1] < 0) {\n                this.#instances[1] = wasm.createInstance()\n                if (this.#pendingModelJson.length > 0) {\n                    try {\n                        wasm.loadModel(this.#instances[1], this.#pendingModelJson)\n                    } catch (error) {\n                        console.error(\"NAM loadModel failed in onMonoChanged:\", error)\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    #onModelChanged(): void {\n        this.#onModelJsonChanged(this.#adapter.getModelJson())\n    }\n\n    #onModelJsonChanged(modelJson: string): void {\n        if (this.#terminated) {return}\n        this.#pendingModelJson = modelJson\n        const module = NeuralAmpDeviceProcessor.#wasmModule\n        if (module.nonEmpty()) {\n            this.#initInstance()\n            this.#applyModel()\n        } else {\n            NeuralAmpDeviceProcessor.fetchWasm(this.#context.engineToClient)\n                .then(() => {\n                    if (this.#terminated) {return}\n                    this.#initInstance()\n                    this.#applyModel()\n                })\n                .catch(error => console.error(\"Failed to load NAM WASM:\", error))\n        }\n    }\n\n    #applyModel(): void {\n        if (this.#terminated) {return}\n        const module = NeuralAmpDeviceProcessor.#wasmModule\n        if (module.isEmpty()) {\n            this.#modelLoaded = false\n            return\n        }\n        if (this.#instances[0] < 0) {\n            this.#initInstance()\n        }\n        if (this.#instances[0] < 0) {\n            this.#modelLoaded = false\n            return\n        }\n        const wasm = module.unwrap()\n        if (this.#pendingModelJson.length === 0) {\n            for (const instance of this.#instances) {\n                if (instance >= 0) {wasm.unloadModel(instance)}\n            }\n            this.#modelLoaded = false\n            return\n        }\n        try {\n            this.#modelLoaded = wasm.loadModel(this.#instances[0], this.#pendingModelJson)\n            if (this.#instances[1] >= 0) {\n                this.#modelLoaded = this.#modelLoaded && wasm.loadModel(this.#instances[1], this.#pendingModelJson)\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error(\"NAM loadModel failed:\", error)\n            this.#modelLoaded = false\n        }\n    }\n}\n", "import {BiquadCoeff, dbToGain} from \"@opendaw/lib-dsp\"\nimport {int} from \"@opendaw/lib-std\"\n\nexport type NoiseColor = \"white\" | \"pink\" | \"brown\"\n\nconst NOISE_SEED = 0xF123F42\n\nexport class NoiseGenerator {\n    #seed: number = NOISE_SEED\n    #b0 = 0\n    #b1 = 0\n    #b2 = 0\n    #b3 = 0\n    #b4 = 0\n    #b5 = 0\n    #b6 = 0\n    #brown = 0\n\n    fill(color: NoiseColor, target: Float32Array, fromIndex: int, toIndex: int): void {\n        let seed = this.#seed\n        switch (color) {\n            case \"white\":\n                for (let i = fromIndex; i < toIndex; i++) {\n                    let t = seed += 0x6D2B79F5\n                    t = Math.imul(t ^ t >>> 15, t | 1)\n                    t ^= t + Math.imul(t ^ t >>> 7, t | 61)\n                    target[i] = (((t ^ t >>> 14) >>> 0) / 4294967296) * 2 - 1\n                }\n                break\n            case \"pink\": {\n                let b0 = this.#b0, b1 = this.#b1, b2 = this.#b2, b3 = this.#b3\n                let b4 = this.#b4, b5 = this.#b5, b6 = this.#b6\n                for (let i = fromIndex; i < toIndex; i++) {\n                    let t = seed += 0x6D2B79F5\n                    t = Math.imul(t ^ t >>> 15, t | 1)\n                    t ^= t + Math.imul(t ^ t >>> 7, t | 61)\n                    const white = (((t ^ t >>> 14) >>> 0) / 4294967296) * 2 - 1\n                    b0 = 0.99886 * b0 + white * 0.0555179\n                    b1 = 0.99332 * b1 + white * 0.0750759\n                    b2 = 0.96900 * b2 + white * 0.1538520\n                    b3 = 0.86650 * b3 + white * 0.3104856\n                    b4 = 0.55000 * b4 + white * 0.5329522\n                    b5 = -0.7616 * b5 - white * 0.0168980\n                    target[i] = (b0 + b1 + b2 + b3 + b4 + b5 + b6 + white * 0.5362) * 0.11\n                    b6 = white * 0.115926\n                }\n                this.#b0 = b0\n                this.#b1 = b1\n                this.#b2 = b2\n                this.#b3 = b3\n                this.#b4 = b4\n                this.#b5 = b5\n                this.#b6 = b6\n                break\n            }\n            case \"brown\": {\n                let brown = this.#brown\n                for (let i = fromIndex; i < toIndex; i++) {\n                    let t = seed += 0x6D2B79F5\n                    t = Math.imul(t ^ t >>> 15, t | 1)\n                    t ^= t + Math.imul(t ^ t >>> 7, t | 61)\n                    const white = (((t ^ t >>> 14) >>> 0) / 4294967296) * 2 - 1\n                    brown = (brown + 0.02 * white) / 1.02\n                    target[i] = brown * 3.5\n                }\n                this.#brown = brown\n                break\n            }\n        }\n        this.#seed = seed\n    }\n\n    reset(): void {\n        this.#seed = NOISE_SEED\n        this.#b0 = this.#b1 = this.#b2 = this.#b3 = this.#b4 = this.#b5 = this.#b6 = 0\n        this.#brown = 0\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Vocoder DSP. Carrier passes through the device as the main input; the modulator\n * can be synthesised noise, the carrier itself (multi-band gate), or an external\n * sidechain signal.\n *\n * Hot loop is specialised on modulator mode (stereo / mono / self) so the inner\n * per-sample loop has zero branches. Band state lives in flat Float32Arrays and is\n * hoisted into locals for each band iteration.\n *\n * Coefficients are interpolated geometrically every SUB_BLOCK samples. Band-count\n * changes are click-free via a per-band fade scalar.\n */\nexport class VocoderDsp {\n    static readonly MAX_BANDS = 16\n    /** Coefficient interpolation stride (2 sub-blocks per 128-sample render quantum). */\n    static readonly SUB_BLOCK = 64\n    /** Per-sub-block geometric lerp factor.\n     *  0.25 \u2192 \u2248 4.6 ms \u03C4 @ 48 kHz (default, close to reference's 5 ms ramp).\n     *  Alternatives: 0.5 \u2192 \u2248 1.8 ms (snappier), 0.15 \u2192 \u2248 8 ms (smoother but laggier). */\n    static readonly COEFF_LERP = 0.25\n    /** Click-suppression fade for band-count changes. Short enough to feel instant. */\n    static readonly BAND_FADE_SECONDS = 0.003\n    static readonly COLD_THRESHOLD = 1e-4\n\n    readonly #sampleRate: number\n\n    // \u2500\u2500 Band-count fade state \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    readonly #targetActive: Int8Array\n    readonly #bandGainCurrent: Float32Array\n    #fadeCoeff: number = 0.0\n    #processedBands: number = VocoderDsp.MAX_BANDS\n    #targetBandCount: number = 16\n\n    // \u2500\u2500 Target parameter values (written by setters) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    #targetCarrierMinFreq: number = 80.0\n    #targetCarrierMaxFreq: number = 12000.0\n    #targetModulatorMinFreq: number = 80.0\n    #targetModulatorMaxFreq: number = 12000.0\n    #targetQMin: number = 2.0\n    #targetQMax: number = 20.0\n    #coeffsDirty: boolean = true\n\n    // \u2500\u2500 Current (lerped) per-band frequencies & Q \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    readonly #curCarrierFreq: Float32Array\n #tmpTargetCarrierFreq: Float32Array\n    readonly #tmpTargetModulatorFreq: Float32Array\n    readonly #tmpTargetQ: Float32Array\n\n    // \u2500\u2500 Envelope follower state (per band, mono) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    readonly #envelope: Float32Array\n    #attackCoeff: number = 0.0\n    #releaseCoeff: number = 0.0\n\n    // \u2500\u2500 Output level (compensated for bandwidth) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    static readonly GAIN_K = 186.0\n    #bandGain: number = 75\n    #outputGain: number = 1.0\n\n    // \u2500\u2500 Coefficient storage: flat Float32Array(5 * MAX_BANDS) per side \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    // Layout per band i: [b0, b1, b2, a1, a2] at offset i*5\n    readonly #carrierCoeffs: Float32Array\n    readonly #modulatorCoeffs: Float32Array\n\n    // Scratch BiquadCoeff instances used only during interpolation\n    readonly #scratchCarrierCoeff: BiquadCoeff\n    readonly #scratchModulatorCoeff: BiquadCoeff\n\n    // \u2500\u2500 Carrier biquad state (stereo, flat arrays) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    readonly #carCxL1: Float32Array\n    readonly
