readonly #modMxL2: Float32Array\n    readonly #modMyL1: Float32Array\n    readonly #modMyL2: Float32Array\n    readonly #modMxR1: Float32Array\n    readonly #modMxR2: Float32Array\n    readonly #modMyR1: Float32Array\n    readonly #modMyR2: Float32Array\n\n    // \u2500\u2500 Derived mix gains \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    #wetGain: number = 1.0\n    #dryGain: number = 0.0\n\n    constructor(sampleRate: number) {\n        this.#sampleRate = sampleRate\n        const N = VocoderDsp.MAX_BANDS\n        const alloc = () => new Float32Array(N)\n\n        this.#targetActive = new Int8Array(N)\n        this.#bandGainCurrent = alloc()\n\n        this.#curCarrierFreq = alloc()\n        this.#curModulatorFreq = alloc()\n        this.#curCarrierQ = alloc()\n        this.#curModulatorQ = alloc()\n\n        this.#tmpTargetCarrierFreq = alloc()\n        this.#tmpTargetModulatorFreq = alloc()\n        this.#tmpTargetQ = alloc()\n\n        this.#envelope = alloc()\n\n        this.#carrierCoeffs = new Float32Array(5 * N)\n        this.#modulatorCoeffs = new Float32Array(5 * N)\n        this.#scratchCarrierCoeff = new BiquadCoeff()\n        this.#scratchModulatorCoeff = new BiquadCoeff()\n\n        this.#carCxL1 = alloc()\n        this.#carCxL2 = alloc()\n        this.#carCyL1 = alloc()\n        this.#carCyL2 = alloc()\n        this.#carCxR1 = alloc()\n        this.#carCxR2 = alloc()\n        this.#carCyR1 = alloc()\n        this.#carCyR2 = alloc()\n        this.#modMxL1 = alloc()\n        this.#modMxL2 = alloc()\n        this.#modMyL1 = alloc()\n        this.#modMyL2 = alloc()\n        this.#modMxR1 = alloc()\n        this.#modMxR2 = alloc()\n        this.#modMyR1 = alloc()\n        this.#modMyR2 = alloc()\n\n        // Start with all bands active up to the default count, fully faded in.\n        for (let i = 0; i < this.#targetBandCount; i++) {\n            this.#targetActive[i] = 1\n            this.#bandGainCurrent[i] = 1.0\n        }\n\n        // Snap cur = target for every slot so the first geometric lerp has a valid\n        // non-zero denominator. Use fallback values that mirror the defaults.\n        this.#computeBandTargets()\n        for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {\n            const t = Math.min(i, this.#targetBandCount - 1)\n            this.#curCarrierFreq[i] = this.#tmpTargetCarrierFreq[t]\n            this.#curModulatorFreq[i] = this.#tmpTargetModulatorFreq[t]\n            this.#curCarrierQ[i] = this.#tmpTargetQ[t]\n            this.#curModulatorQ[i] = this.#tmpTargetQ[t]\n        }\n\n        this.#fadeCoeff = Math.exp(-1 / (sampleRate * VocoderDsp.BAND_FADE_SECONDS))\n        this.setAttackSeconds(0.005)\n        this.setReleaseSeconds(0.030)\n        this.#recomputeBandGain()\n        this.#writeAllCoefficients()\n    }\n\n    // \u2500\u2500 Parameter setters \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n    set carrierMinFreq(hz: number) {\n        this.#targetCarrierMinFreq = hz\n        this.#coeffsDirty = true\n    }\n    set carrierMaxFreq(hz: number) {\n        this.#targetCarrierMaxFreq = hz\n        this.#coeffsDirty = true\n    }\n    set modulatorMinFreq(hz: number) {\n        this.#targetModulatorMinFreq = hz\n        this.#coeffsDirty = true\n    }\n    set modulatorMaxFreq(hz: number) {\n        this.#targetModulatorMaxFreq = hz\n        this.#coeffsDirty = true\n    }\n    set qMin(q: number) {\n        this.#targetQMin = q\n        this.#coeffsDirty = true\n    }\n    set qMax(q: number) {\n        this.#targetQMax = q\n        this.#coeffsDirty = true\n    }\n\n    set mix(value: number) {\n        const angle = value * Math.PI * 0.5\n        this.#dryGain = Math.cos(angle)\n        this.#wetGain = Math.sin(angle)\n    }\n\n    setAttackSeconds(seconds: number): void {\n        this.#attackCoeff = Math.exp(-1 / (this.#sampleRate * seconds))\n    }\n\n    setReleaseSeconds(seconds: number): void {\n        this.#releaseCoeff = Math.exp(-1 / (this.#sampleRate * seconds))\n    }\n\n    set gain(db: number) { this.#outputGain = dbToGain(db) }\n\n    #recomputeBandGain(): void {\n        const N = this.#targetBandCount\n        const qMax = this.#targetQMax\n        const qLog = Math.log(this.#targetQMax / this.#targetQMin)\n        let sum = 0\n        for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {\n            const x = N === 1 ? 0 : i / (N - 1)\n            const q = qMax * Math.exp(-x * qLog)\n            sum += 1.0 / q\n        }\n        this.#bandGain = VocoderDsp.GAIN_K / sum\n    }\n\n    set bandCount(count: number) {\n        // Defensive guard \u2014 stray save-file value won't crash the DSP.\n        if (count !== 8 && count !== 12 && count !== 16) return\n        if (count === this.#targetBandCount) return\n        this.#targetBandCount = count\n        this.#coeffsDirty = true\n        for (let i = 0; i < VocoderDsp.MAX_BANDS; i++) {\n            this.#targetActive[i] = i < count ? 1 : 0\n        }\n        // For bands fading in from a cold start, reset biquad state and snap\n        // their cur freq/Q to the target layout so the fade-in begins cleanly.\n        this.#computeBandTargets()\n        for (let i = 0; i < VocoderDsp.MAX_BANDS; i++) {\n            if (this.#targetActive[i] === 1 && this.#bandGainCurrent[i] < VocoderDsp.COLD_THRESHOLD) {\n                this.#resetBandState(i)\n                this.#curCarrierFreq[i] = this.#tmpTargetCarrierFreq[i]\n                this.#curModulatorFreq[i] = this.#tmpTargetModulatorFreq[i]\n                this.#curCarrierQ[i] = this.#tmpTargetQ[i]\n                this.#curModulatorQ[i] = this.#tmpTargetQ[i]\n            }\n        }\n        // Cover any band still ringing out; process loop shrinks this back.\n        this.#processedBands = VocoderDsp.MAX_BANDS\n    }\n\n    reset(): void {\n        for (let i = 0; i < VocoderDsp.MAX_BANDS; i++) {\n            this.#resetBandState(i)\n            this.#bandGainCurrent[i] = this.#targetActive[i]\n        }\n        this.#processedBands = this.#targetBandCount\n    }\n\n    // \u2500\u2500 Entry points \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n    processStereoMod(carL: Float32Array, carR: Float32Array,\n                     modL: Float32Array, modR: Float32Array,\n                     outL: Float32Array, outR: Float32Array,\n                     fromIndex: int, toIndex: int): void {\n        let from = fromIndex\n        while (from < toIndex) {\n            const to = Math.min(from + VocoderDsp.SUB_BLOCK, toIndex)\n            this.#interpolateCoeffs()\n            this.#innerStereoMod(carL, carR, modL, modR, outL, outR, from, to)\n            from = to\n        }\n        this.#trimProcessedBands()\n    }\n\n    processMonoMod(carL: Float32Array, carR: Float32Array, mod: Float32Array,\n                   outL: Float32Array, outR: Float32Array,\n                   fromIndex: int, toIndex: int): void {\n        let from = fromIndex\n        while (from < toIndex) {\n            const to = Math.min(from + VocoderDsp.SUB_BLOCK, toIndex)\n            this.#interpolateCoeffs()\n            this.#innerMonoMod(carL, carR, mod, outL, outR, from, to)\n            from = to\n        }\n        this.#trimProcessedBands()\n    }\n\n    processSelf(carL: Float32Array, carR: Float32Array,\n                outL: Float32Array, outR: Float32Array,\n                fromIndex: int, toIndex: int): void {\n        let from = fromIndex\n        while (from < toIndex) {\n            const to = Math.min(from + VocoderDsp.SUB_BLOCK, toIndex)\n            this.#interpolateCoeffs()\n            this.#innerSelf(carL, carR, outL, outR, from, to)\n            from = to\n        }\n        this.#trimProcessedBands()\n    }\n\n    // \u2500\u2500 Internals: band target spread & coefficient interpolation \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n    #computeBandTargets(): void {\n        const N = this.#targetBandCount\n        const cfMin = this.#targetCarrierMinFreq\n        const mfMin = this.#targetModulatorMinFreq\n        const cfLog = Math.log(this.#targetCarrierMaxFreq / cfMin)\n        const mfLog = Math.log(this.#targetModulatorMaxFreq / mfMin)\n        const qMin = this.#targetQMin\n        const qLog = Math.log(this.#targetQMax / qMin)\n        const denom = N === 1 ? 1 : N - 1\n        for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {\n            const x = N === 1 ? 0 : i / denom\n            this.#tmpTargetCarrierFreq[i] = cfMin * Math.exp(x * cfLog)\n            this.#tmpTargetModulatorFreq[i] = mfMin * Math.exp(x * mfLog)\n            this.#tmpTargetQ[i] = this.#targetQMax * Math.exp(-x * qLog)\n        }\n        // Slots [N..MAX_BANDS) retain stale targets but are skipped by the\n        // interpolation / process loops via the targetActive check.\n    }\n\n    #interpolateCoeffs(): void {\n        if (!this.#coeffsDirty) return\n        this.#recomputeBandGain()\n        this.#computeBandTargets()\n        const alpha = VocoderDsp.COEFF_LERP\n        const sr = this.#sampleRate\n        const cc = this.#scratchCarrierCoeff\n        const mc = this.#scratchModulatorCoeff\n        const carC = this.#carrierCoeffs\n        const modC = this.#modulatorCoeffs\n        const upper = this.#processedBands\n        let converged = true\n        for (let i = 0; i < upper; i++) {\n            if (this.#targetActive[i] !== 0) {\n                this.#curCarrierFreq[i] *=\n                    Math.pow(this.#tmpTargetCarrierFreq[i] / this.#curCarrierFreq[i], alpha)\n                this.#curModulatorFreq[i] *=\n                    Math.pow(this.#tmpTargetModulatorFreq[i] / this.#curModulatorFreq[i], alpha)\n                this.#curCarrierQ[i] *=\n                    Math.pow(this.#tmpTargetQ[i] / this.#curCarrierQ[i], alpha)\n                this.#curModulatorQ[i] *=\n                    Math.pow(this.#tmpTargetQ[i] / this.#curModulatorQ[i], alpha)\n                const eps = 0.01\n                if (Math.abs(this.#curCarrierFreq[i] - this.#tmpTargetCarrierFreq[i]) > eps\n                    || Math.abs(this.#curModulatorFreq[i] - this.#tmpTargetModulatorFreq[i]) > eps\n                    || Math.abs(this.#curCarrierQ[i] - this.#tmpTargetQ[i]) > eps) {\n                    converged = false\n                }\n            }\n            cc.setBandpassParams(this.#curCarrierFreq[i] / sr, this.#curCarrierQ[i])\n            mc.setBandpassParams(this.#curModulatorFreq[i] / sr, this.#curModulatorQ[i])\n            const o = i * 5\n            carC[o + 0] = cc.b0\n            carC[o + 1] = cc.b1\n            carC[o + 2] = cc.b2\n            carC[o + 3] = cc.a1\n            carC[o + 4] = cc.a2\n            modC[o + 0] = mc.b0\n            modC[o + 1] = mc.b1\n            modC[o + 2] = mc.b2\n            modC[o + 3] = mc.a1\n            modC[o + 4] = mc.a2\n        }\n        if (converged) this.#coeffsDirty = false\n    }\n\n    #writeAllCoefficients(): void {\n        // Constructor-time initial write using the already-snapped cur values.\n        const sr = this.#sampleRate\n        const cc = this.#scratchCarrierCoeff\n        const mc = this.#scratchModulatorCoeff\n        const carC = this.#carrierCoeffs\n        const modC = this.#modulatorCoeffs\n        for (let i = 0; i < VocoderDsp.MAX_BANDS; i++) {\n            cc.setBandpassParams(this.#curCarrierFreq[i] / sr, this.#curCarrierQ[i])\n            mc.setBandpassParams(this.#curModulatorFreq[i] / sr, this.#curModulatorQ[i])\n            const o = i * 5\n            carC[o + 0] = cc.b0\n            carC[o + 1] = cc.b1\n            carC[o + 2] = cc.b2\n            carC[o + 3] = cc.a1\n            carC[o + 4] = cc.a2\n            modC[o + 0] = mc.b0\n            modC[o + 1] = mc.b1\n            modC[o + 2] = mc.b2\n            modC[o + 3] = mc.a1\n            modC[o + 4] = mc.a2\n        }\n    }\n\n    #resetBandState(i: int): void {\n        this.#carCxL1[i] = 0\n        this.#carCxL2[i] = 0\n        this.#carCyL1[i] = 0\n        this.#carCyL2[i] = 0\n        this.#carCxR1[i] = 0\n        this.#carCxR2[i] = 0\n        this.#carCyR1[i] = 0\n        this.#carCyR2[i] = 0\n        this.#modMxL1[i] = 0\n        this.#modMxL2[i] = 0\n        this.#modMyL1[i] = 0\n        this.#modMyL2[i] = 0\n        this.#modMxR1[i] = 0\n        this.#modMxR2[i] = 0\n        this.#modMyR1[i] = 0\n        this.#modMyR2[i] = 0\n        this.#envelope[i] = 0\n    }\n\n    #trimProcessedBands(): void {\n        for (let i = this.#processedBands - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n            if (this.#targetActive[i] === 1 || this.#bandGainCurrent[i] >= VocoderDsp.COLD_THRESHOLD) {\n                this.#processedBands = i + 1\n                return\n            }\n        }\n        this.#processedBands = 0\n    }\n\n    // \u2500\u2500 Hot loops: three specialisations \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n    #innerStereoMod(carL: Float32Array, carR: Float32Array,\n                    modL: Float32Array, modR: Float32Array,\n                    outL: Float32Array, outR: Float32Array,\n                    from: int, to: int): void {\n        const dry = this.#dryGain\n        for (let i = from; i < to; i++) {\n            outL[i] = carL[i] * dry\n            outR[i] = carR[i] * dry\n        }\n\n        const wet = this.#wetGain\n        const bandG = this.#bandGain * this.#outputGain\n        const aCoeff = this.#attackCoeff\n        const rCoeff = this.#releaseCoeff\n        const fade = this.#fadeCoeff\n        const upper = this.#processedBands\n        const carC = this.#carrierCoeffs\n        const modC = this.#modulatorCoeffs\n\n        for (let i = 0; i < upper; i++) {\n            const o = i * 5\n            const cb0 = carC[o + 0], cb1 = carC[o + 1], cb2 = carC[o + 2]\n            const ca1 = carC[o + 3], ca2 = carC[o + 4]\n            const mb0 = modC[o + 0], mb1 = modC[o + 1], mb2 = modC[o + 2]\n            const ma1 = modC[o + 3], ma2 = modC[o + 4]\n\n            let cxL1 = this.#carCxL1[i], cxL2 = this.#carCxL2[i]\n            let cyL1 = this.#carCyL1[i], cyL2 = this.#carCyL2[i]\n            let cxR1 = this.#carCxR1[i], cxR2 = this.#carCxR2[i]\n            let cyR1 = this.#carCyR1[i], cyR2 = this.#carCyR2[i]\n            let mxL1 = this.#modMxL1[i], mxL2 = this.#modMxL2[i]\n            let myL1 = this.#modMyL1[i], myL2 = this.#modMyL2[i]\n            let mxR1 = this.#modMxR1[i], mxR2 = this.#modMxR2[i]\n            let myR1 = this.#modMyR1[i], myR2 = this.#modMyR2[i]\n\n            let env = this.#envelope[i]\n            let gain = this.#bandGainCurrent[i]\n            const tgt = this.#targetActive[i]\n\n            for (let s = from; s < to; s++) {\n                gain = tgt + fade * (gain - tgt)\n\n                // Modulator bandpass (stereo)\n                const mxL = modL[s]\n                const myL = (mb0 * mxL + mb1 * mxL1 + mb2 * mxL2 - ma1 * myL1 - ma2 * myL2) + 1e-18 - 1e-18\n                mxL2 = mxL1\n                mxL1 = mxL\n                myL2 = myL1\n                myL1 = myL\n                const mxR = modR[s]\n                const myR = (mb0 * mxR + mb1 * mxR1 + mb2 * mxR2 - ma1 * myR1 - ma2 * myR2) + 1e-18 - 1e-18\n                mxR2 = mxR1\n                mxR1 = mxR\n                myR2 = myR1\n                myR1 = myR\n\n                // Envelope follower on max(|L|, |R|)\n                const aL = myL < 0 ? -myL : myL\n                const aR = myR < 0 ? -myR : myR\n                const peak = aL > aR ? aL : aR\n                env = env < peak\n                    ? peak + aCoeff * (env - peak)\n                    : peak + rCoeff * (env - peak)\n\n                // Carrier bandpass (stereo)\n                const cxL = carL[s]\n                const cyL = (cb0 * cxL + cb1 * cxL1 + cb2 * cxL2 - ca1 * cyL1 - ca2 * cyL2) + 1e-18 - 1e-18\n                cxL2 = cxL1\n                cxL1 = cxL\n                cyL2 = cyL1\n                cyL1 = cyL\n                const cxR = carR[s]\n                const cyR = (cb0 * cxR + cb1 * cxR1 + cb2 * cxR2 - ca1 * cyR1 - ca2 * cyR2) + 1e-18 - 1e-18\n                cxR2 = cxR1\n                cxR1 = cxR\n                cyR2 = cyR1\n                cyR1 = cyR\n\n                const k = env * bandG * wet * gain\n                outL[s] += cyL * k\n                outR[s] += cyR * k\n            }\n\n            this.#carCxL1[i] = cxL1\n            this.#carCxL2[i] = cxL2\n            this.#carCyL1[i] = cyL1\n            this.#carCyL2[i] = cyL2\n            this.#carCxR1[i] = cxR1\n            this.#carCxR2[i] = cxR2\n            this.#carCyR1[i] = cyR1\n            this.#carCyR2[i] = cyR2\n            this.#modMxL1[i] = mxL1\n            this.#modMxL2[i] = mxL2\n            this.#modMyL1[i] = myL1\n            this.#modMyL2[i] = myL2\n            this.#modMxR1[i] = mxR1\n            this.#modMxR2[i] = mxR2\n            this.#modMyR1[i] = myR1\n            this.#modMyR2[i] = myR2\n            this.#envelope[i] = env\n            this.#bandGainCurrent[i] = gain\n        }\n    }\n\n    #innerMonoMod(carL: Float32Array, carR: Float32Array, mod: Float32Array,\n                  outL: Float32Array, outR: Float32Array,\n                  from: int, to: int): void {\n        const dry = this.#dryGain\n        for (let i = from; i < to; i++) {\n            outL[i] = carL[i] * dry\n            outR[i] = carR[i] * dry\n        }\n\n        const wet = this.#wetGain\n        const bandG = this.#bandGain * this.#outputGain\n        const aCoeff = this.#attackCoeff\n        const rCoeff = this.#releaseCoeff\n        const fade = this.#fadeCoeff\n        const upper = this.#processedBands\n        const carC = this.#carrierCoeffs\n        const modC = this.#modulatorCoeffs\n\n        for (let i = 0; i < upper; i++) {\n            const o = i * 5\n            const cb0 = carC[o + 0], cb1 = carC[o + 1], cb2 = carC[o + 2]\n            const ca1 = carC[o + 3], ca2 = carC[o + 4]\n            const mb0 = modC[o + 0], mb1 = modC[o + 1], mb2 = modC[o + 2]\n            const ma1 = modC[o + 3], ma2 = modC[o + 4]\n\n            let cxL1 = this.#carCxL1[i], cxL2 = this.#carCxL2[i]\n            let cyL1 = this.#carCyL1[i], cyL2 = this.#carCyL2[i]\n            let cxR1 = this.#carCxR1[i], cxR2 = this.#carCxR2[i]\n            let cyR1 = this.#carCyR1[i], cyR2 = this.#carCyR2[i]\n            // Mono modulator: only L slots used.\n            let mxL1 = this.#modMxL1[i], mxL2 = this.#modMxL2[i]\n            let myL1 = this.#modMyL1[i], myL2 = this.#modMyL2[i]\n\n            let env = this.#envelope[i]\n            let gain = this.#bandGainCurrent[i]\n            const tgt = this.#targetActive[i]\n\n            for (let s = from; s < to; s++) {\n                gain = tgt + fade * (gain - tgt)\n\n                // Single modulator bandpass\n                const mx = mod[s]\n                const my = (mb0 * mx + mb1 * mxL1 + mb2 * mxL2 - ma1 * myL1 - ma2 * myL2) + 1e-18 - 1e-18\n                mxL2 = mxL1\n                mxL1 = mx\n                myL2 = myL1\n                myL1 = my\n\n                const peak = my < 0 ? -my : my\n                env = env < peak\n                    ? peak + aCoeff * (env - peak)\n                    : peak + rCoeff * (env - peak)\n\n                // Carrier bandpass (stereo)\n                const cxL = carL[s]\n                const cyL = (cb0 * cxL + cb1 * cxL1 + cb2 * cxL2 - ca1 * cyL1 - ca2 * cyL2) + 1e-18 - 1e-18\n                cxL2 = cxL1\n                cxL1 = cxL\n                cyL2 = cyL1\n                cyL1 = cyL\n                const cxR = carR[s]\n                const cyR = (cb0 * cxR + cb1 * cxR1 + cb2 * cxR2 - ca1 * cyR1 - ca2 * cyR2) + 1e-18 - 1e-18\n                cxR2 = cxR1\n                cxR1 = cxR\n                cyR2 = cyR1\n                cyR1 = cyR\n\n                const k = env * bandG * wet * gain\n                outL[s] += cyL * k\n                outR[s] += cyR * k\n            }\n\n            this.#carCxL1[i] = cxL1\n            this.#carCxL2[i] = cxL2\n            this.#carCyL1[i] = cyL1\n            this.#carCyL2[i] = cyL2\n            this.#carCxR1[i] = cxR1\n            this.#carCxR2[i] = cxR2\n            this.#carCyR1[i] = cyR1\n            this.#carCyR2[i] = cyR2\n            this.#modMxL1[i] = mxL1\n            this.#modMxL2[i] = mxL2\n            this.#modMyL1[i] = myL1\n            this.#modMyL2[i] = myL2\n            this.#envelope[i] = env\n            this.#bandGainCurrent[i] = gain\n        }\n    }\n\n    #innerSelf(carL: Float32Array, carR: Float32Array,\n               outL: Float32Array, outR: Float32Array,\n               from: int, to: int): void {\n        const dry = this.#dryGain\n        for (let i = from; i < to; i++) {\n            outL[i] = carL[i] * dry\n            outR[i] = carR[i] * dry\n        }\n\n        const wet = this.#wetGain\n        const bandG = this.#bandGain * this.#outputGain\n        const aCoeff = this.#attackCoeff\n        const rCoeff = this.#releaseCoeff\n        const fade = this.#fadeCoeff\n        const upper = this.#processedBands\n        const carC = this.#carrierCoeffs\n\n        for (let i = 0; i < upper; i++) {\n            const o = i * 5\n            const cb0 = carC[o + 0], cb1 = carC[o + 1], cb2 = carC[o + 2]\n            const ca1 = carC[o + 3], ca2 = carC[o + 4]\n\n            let cxL1 = this.#carCxL1[i], cxL2 = this.#carCxL2[i]\n            let cyL1 = this.#carCyL1[i], cyL2 = this.#carCyL2[i]\n            let cxR1 = this.#carCxR1[i], cxR2 = this.#carCxR2[i]\n            let cyR1 = this.#carCyR1[i], cyR2 = this.#carCyR2[i]\n\n            let env = this.#envelope[i]\n            let gain = this.#bandGainCurrent[i]\n            const tgt = this.#targetActive[i]\n\n            for (let s = from; s < to; s++) {\n                gain = tgt + fade * (gain - tgt)\n\n                // Carrier bandpass (stereo) \u2014 the envelope follows this directly.\n                const cxL = carL[s]\n                const cyL = (cb0 * cxL + cb1 * cxL1 + cb2 * cxL2 - ca1 * cyL1 - ca2 * cyL2) + 1e-18 - 1e-18\n                cxL2 = cxL1\n                cxL1 = cxL\n                cyL2 = cyL1\n                cyL1 = cyL\n                const cxR = carR[s]\n                const cyR = (cb0 * cxR + cb1 * cxR1 + cb2 * cxR2 - ca1 * cyR1 - ca2 * cyR2) + 1e-18 - 1e-18\n                cxR2 = cxR1\n                cxR1 = cxR\n                cyR2 = cyR1\n                cyR1 = cyR\n\n                // Envelope follower on the band's own carrier energy \u2014 multi-band gate.\n                const aL = cyL < 0 ? -cyL : cyL\n                const aR = cyR < 0 ? -cyR : cyR\n                const peak = aL > aR ? aL : aR\n                env = env < peak\n                    ? peak + aCoeff * (env - peak)\n                    : peak + rCoeff * (env - peak)\n\n                const k = env * bandG * wet * gain\n                outL[s] += cyL * k\n                outR[s] += cyR * k\n            }\n\n            this.#carCxL1[i] = cxL1\n            this.#carCxL2[i] = cxL2\n            this.#carCyL1[i] = cyL1\n            this.#carCyL2[i] = cyL2\n            this.#carCxR1[i] = cxR1\n            this.#carCxR2[i] = cxR2\n            this.#carCyR1[i] = cyR1\n            this.#carCyR2[i] = cyR2\n            this.#envelope[i] = env\n            this.#bandGainCurrent[i] = gain\n        }\n    }\n}\n", "import {AudioEffectDeviceAdapter, ModulatorMode, VocoderDeviceBoxAdapter} from \"@opendaw/studio-adapters\"\nimport {int, Option, Terminable, Terminator, UUID} from \"@opendaw/lib-std\"\nimport {AudioAnalyser, AudioBuffer, Event, RenderQuantum} from \"@opendaw/lib-dsp\"\nimport {EngineContext} from \"../../EngineContext\"\nimport {Block, Processor, ProcessPhase} VocoderDeviceProcessor extends AudioProcessor implements AudioEffectDeviceProcessor {\n    static ID: int = 0 | 0\n\n    readonly #id: int = VocoderDeviceProcessor.ID++\n    readonly #adapter: VocoderDeviceBoxAdapter\n\n    readonly parameterCarrierMinFreq: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterCarrierMaxFreq: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterModulatorMinFreq: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterModulatorMaxFreq: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterQMin: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterQMax: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterEnvAttack: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterEnvRelease: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterGain: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterMix: AutomatableParameter<number>\n\n    readonly #output: AudioBuffer\n    readonly #peaks: PeakBroadcaster\n    readonly #dsp: VocoderDsp\n    readonly #noise: NoiseGenerator\n\n    readonly #analyser: AudioAnalyser\n    readonly #spectrum: Float32Array\n\n    readonly #modScratchL: Float32Array\n    readonly #modScratchR: Float32Array\n\n    #spectrumMode: \"none\" | \"modulator\" | \"carrier\" = \"none\"\n\n    readonly #sideChainConnection: Terminator = new Terminator()\n\n    #source: Option<AudioBuffer> = Option.None\n    #sideChain: Option<AudioBuffer> = Option.None\n    #needsSideChainResolution: boolean = false\n    #modulatorMode: ModulatorMode = \"noise-pink\"\n\n    constructor(context: EngineContext, adapter: VocoderDeviceBoxAdapter) {\n        super(context)\n\n        this.#adapter = adapter\n        this.#output = new AudioBuffer()\n        this.#peaks = this.own(new PeakBroadcaster(context.broadcaster, adapter.address))\n        this.#dsp = new VocoderDsp(sampleRate)\n        this.#noise = new NoiseGenerator()\n        this.#analyser = new AudioAnalyser()\n        this.#spectrum = new Float32Array(this.#analyser.numBins())\n        this.#modScratchL = new Float32Array(RenderQuantum)\n        this.#modScratchR = new Float32Array(RenderQuantum)\n\n        const {\n            carrierMinFreq, carrierMaxFreq, modulatorMinFreq, modulatorMaxFreq,\n            qMin, qMax, envAttack, envRelease, gain, mix\n        } = adapter.namedParameter\n\n        this.parameterCarrierMinFreq = this.own(this.bindParameter(carrierMinFreq))\n        this.parameterCarrierMaxFreq = this.own(this.bindParameter(carrierMaxFreq))\n        this.parameterModulatorMinFreq = this.own(this.bindParameter(modulatorMinFreq))\n        this.parameterModulatorMaxFreq = this.own(this.bindParameter(modulatorMaxFreq))\n        this.parameterQMin = this.own(this.bindParameter(qMin))\n        this.parameterQMax = this.own(this.bindParameter(qMax))\n        this.parameterEnvAttack = this.own(this.bindParameter(envAttack))\n        this.parameterEnvRelease = this.own(this.bindParameter(envRelease))\n        this.parameterGain = this.own(this.bindParameter(gain))\n        this.parameterMix = this.own(this.bindParameter(mix))\n\n        this.ownAll(\n            context.registerProcessor(this),\n            context.audioOutputBufferRegistry.register(adapter.address, this.#output, this.outgoing),\n            context.broadcaster.broadcastFloats(adapter.modulatorSpectrum, this.#spectrum, (hasSubscribers) => {\n                this.#spectrumMode = hasSubscribers ? \"modulator\" : this.#spectrumMode === \"modulator\" ? \"none\" : this.#spectrumMode\n                if (hasSubscribers) {\n                    this.#spectrum.set(this.#analyser.bins())\n                    this.#analyser.decay = true\n                }\n            }),\n            context.broadcaster.broadcastFloats(adapter.carrierSpectrum, this.#spectrum, (hasSubscribers) => {\n                this.#spectrumMode = hasSubscribers ? \"carrier\" : this.#spectrumMode === \"carrier\" ? \"none\" : this.#spectrumMode\n                if (hasSubscribers) {\n                    this.#spectrum.set(this.#analyser.bins())\n                    this.#analyser.decay = true\n                }\n            }),\n            adapter.sideChain.catchupAndSubscribe(() => {\n                this.#sideChainConnection.terminate()\n                this.#sideChain = Option.None\n                this.#needsSideChainResolution = true\n            }),\n            context.subscribeProcessPhase(phase => {\n                if (phase === ProcessPhase.Before && this.#needsSideChainResolution) {\n                    this.#needsSideChainResolution = false\n                    adapter.sideChain.targetVertex.map(({box}) => box.address).ifSome(address => {\n                        context.audioOutputBufferRegistry.resolve(address).ifSome(output => {\n                            this.#sideChain = Option.wrap(output.buffer)\n                            this.#sideChainConnection.own(context.registerEdge(output.processor, this.incoming))\n                        })\n                    })\n                }\n            }),\n            adapter.box.modulatorSource.catchupAndSubscribe(owner => {\n                const value = owner.getValue()\n                this.#modulatorMode = this.#parseMode(value)\n            }),\n            adapter.box.bandCount.catchupAndSubscribe(owner => {\n                this.#dsp.bandCount = owner.getValue()\n            }),\n            this.#sideChainConnection\n        )\n        this.readAllParameters()\n    }\n\n    get incoming(): Processor {return this}\n    get outgoing(): Processor {return this}\n\n    reset(): void {\n        this.#output.clear()\n        this.#peaks.clear()\n        this.eventInput.clear()\n        this.#dsp.reset()\n        this.#noise.reset()\n        this.#analyser.clear()\n        this.#modScratchL.fill(0.0)\n        this.#modScratchR.fill(0.0)\n    }\n\n    get uuid(): UUID.Bytes {return this.#adapter.uuid}\n    get audioOutput(): AudioBuffer {return this.#output}\n\n    setAudioSource(source: AudioBuffer): Terminable {\n        this.#source = Option.wrap(source)\n        return {terminate: () => this.#source = Option.None}\n    }\n\n    index(): int {return this.#adapter.indexField.getValue()}\n    adapter(): AudioEffectDeviceAdapter {return this.#adapter}\n\n    handleEvent(_event: Event): void {}\n\n    processAudio({s0, s1}: Block): void {\n        if (this.#source.isEmpty()) return\n        const source = this.#source.unwrap()\n        const srcL = source.getChannel(0)\n        const srcR = source.getChannel(1)\n        const outL = this.#output.getChannel(0)\n        const outR = this.#output.getChannel(1)\n\n        switch (this.#modulatorMode) {\n            case \"self\":\n                this.#dsp.processSelf(srcL, srcR, outL, outR, s0, s1)\n                break\n            case \"noise-white\":\n            case \"noise-pink\":\n            case \"noise-brown\": {\n                const color: NoiseColor =\n                    this.#modulatorMode === \"noise-white\" ? \"white\"\n                        : this.#modulatorMode === \"noise-brown\" ? \"brown\"\n                            : \"pink\"\n                this.#noise.fill(color, this.#modScratchL, s0, s1)\n                this.#dsp.processMonoMod(srcL, srcR, this.#modScratchL, outL, outR, s0, s1)\n                break\n            }\n            case \"external\": {\n                if (this.#sideChain.nonEmpty()) {\n                    const sc = this.#sideChain.unwrap()\n                    const scL = sc.getChannel(0)\n                    const scR = sc.getChannel(1)\n                    this.#dsp.processStereoMod(srcL, srcR, scL, scR, outL, outR, s0, s1)\n                } else {\n                    // One-block silence fallback while sidechain target is being resolved\n                    this.#modScratchL.fill(0.0, s0, s1)\n                    this.#modScratchR.fill(0.0, s0, s1)\n                    this.#dsp.processStereoMod(srcL, srcR, this.#modScratchL, this.#modScratchR,\n                        outL, outR, s0, s1)\n                }\n                break\n            }\n        }\n\n        this.#peaks.process(outL, outR, s0, s1)\n        if (this.#spectrumMode === \"carrier\") {\n            this.#analyser.process(srcL, srcR, s0, s1)\n        } else if (this.#spectrumMode === \"modulator\") {\n            switch (this.#modulatorMode) {\n                case \"noise-white\":\n                case \"noise-pink\":\n                case \"noise-brown\":\n                    this.#analyser.process(this.#modScratchL, this.#modScratchL, s0, s1)\n                    break\n                case \"self\":\n                    this.#analyser.process(srcL, srcR, s0, s1)\n                    break\n                case \"external\":\n                    if (this.#sideChain.nonEmpty()) {\n                        const sc = this.#sideChain.unwrap()\n                        this.#analyser.process(sc.getChannel(0), sc.getChannel(1), s0, s1)\n                    }\n                    break\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    parameterChanged(parameter: AutomatableParameter): void {\n        if (parameter === this.parameterCarrierMinFreq) {\n            this.#dsp.carrierMinFreq = this.parameterCarrierMinFreq.getValue()\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterCarrierMaxFreq) {\n            this.#dsp.carrierMaxFreq = this.parameterCarrierMaxFreq.getValue()\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterModulatorMinFreq) {\n            this.#dsp.modulatorMinFreq = this.parameterModulatorMinFreq.getValue()\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterModulatorMaxFreq) {\n            this.#dsp.modulatorMaxFreq = this.parameterModulatorMaxFreq.getValue()\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterQMin) {\n            this.#dsp.qMin = this.parameterQMin.getValue()\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterQMax) {\n            this.#dsp.qMax = this.parameterQMax.getValue()\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterEnvAttack) {\n            this.#dsp.setAttackSeconds(this.parameterEnvAttack.getValue() * 0.001)\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterEnvRelease) {\n            this.#dsp.setReleaseSeconds(this.parameterEnvRelease.getValue() * 0.001)\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterGain) {\n            this.#dsp.gain = this.parameterGain.getValue()\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterMix) {\n            this.#dsp.mix = this.parameterMix.getValue()\n        }\n    }\n\n    #parseMode(raw: string): ModulatorMode {\n        switch (raw) {\n            case \"noise-white\":\n            case \"noise-pink\":\n            case \"noise-brown\":\n            case \"self\":\n            case \"external\":\n                return raw\n            default:\n                return \"noise-pink\"\n        }\n    }\n\n    toString(): string {return `{${this.constructor.name} (${this.#id})}`}\n}\n", "import {int, Option, Terminable, UUID} from \"@opendaw/lib-std\"\nimport {AudioEffectDeviceAdapter, WaveshaperDeviceBoxAdapter} from \"@opendaw/studio-adapters\"\nimport {EngineContext} from \"../../EngineContext\"\nimport {Block, Processor} from \"../../processing\"\nimport {PeakBroadcaster} from \"../../PeakBroadcaster\"\nimport {AutomatableParameter} from \"../../AutomatableParameter\"\nimport {AudioEffectDeviceProcessor} from WaveshaperDeviceProcessor extends AudioProcessor implements AudioEffectDeviceProcessor {\n    static ID: int = 0 | 0\n\n    readonly #id: int = WaveshaperDeviceProcessor.ID++\n\n    readonly #adapter: WaveshaperDeviceBoxAdapter\n    readonly #output: AudioBuffer\n    readonly #peaks: PeakBroadcaster\n\n    readonly parameterInputGain: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterOutputGain: AutomatableParameter<number>\n    readonly parameterMix: AutomatableParameter<number>\n\n    #source: Option<AudioBuffer> = Option.None\n    #processed: boolean = false\n    #equation: Waveshaper.Equation = \"tanh\"\n    #smoothInputGain: Ramp<number>\n    #smoothOutputGain: Ramp<number>\n    #smoothMix: Ramp<number>\n\n    constructor(context: EngineContext, adapter: WaveshaperDeviceBoxAdapter) {\n        super(context)\n        this.#adapter = adapter\n        this.#output = new AudioBuffer()\n        this.#peaks = this.own(new PeakBroadcaster(context.broadcaster, adapter.address))\n        const {inputGain, outputGain, mix} = adapter.namedParameter\n        this.parameterInputGain = this.own(this.bindParameter(inputGain))\n        this.parameterOutputGain = this.own(this.bindParameter(outputGain))\n        this.parameterMix = this.own(this.bindParameter(mix))\n        this.#smoothInputGain = Ramp.linear(sampleRate)\n        this.#smoothOutputGain = Ramp.linear(sampleRate)\n        this.#smoothMix = Ramp.linear(sampleRate)\n        this.ownAll(\n            context.registerProcessor(this),\n            context.audioOutputBufferRegistry.register(adapter.address, this.#output, this.outgoing),\n            adapter.box.equation.catchupAndSubscribe(owner => {\n                const value = owner.getValue()\n                this.#equation = value === \"\" ? \"tanh\" : value as Waveshaper.Equation\n            })\n        )\n        this.readAllParameters()\n    }\n\n    get incoming(): Processor {return this}\n    get outgoing(): Processor {return this}\n\n    reset(): void {\n        this.#processed = false\n        this.#peaks.clear()\n        this.#output.clear()\n        this.eventInput.clear()\n    }\n\n    get uuid(): UUID.Bytes {return this.#adapter.uuid}\n    get audioOutput(): AudioBuffer {return this.#output}\n\n    setAudioSource(source: AudioBuffer): Terminable {\n        this.#source = Option.wrap(source)\n        return {terminate: () => this.#source = Option.None}\n    }\n\n    index(): int {return this.#adapter.indexField.getValue()}\n    adapter(): AudioEffectDeviceAdapter {return this.#adapter}\n\n    processAudio({s0, s1}: Block): void {\n        if (this.#source.isEmpty()) {return}\n        const source = this.#source.unwrap()\n        const srcL = source.getChannel(0)\n        const srcR = source.getChannel(1)\n        const outL = this.#output.getChannel(0)\n        const outR = this.#output.getChannel(1)\n        for (let i = s0; i < s1; i++) {\n            outL[i] = srcL[i]\n            outR[i] = srcR[i]\n        }\n        for (let i = s0; i < s1; i++) {\n            const gain = this.#smoothInputGain.moveAndGet()\n            outL[i] *= gain\n            outR[i] *= gain\n        }\n        Waveshaper.process(this.#output.channels() as [Float32Array, Float32Array], this.#equation, s0, s1)\n        for (let i = s0; i < s1; i++) {\n            const gain = this.#smoothOutputGain.moveAndGet()\n            const wet = this.#smoothMix.moveAndGet()\n            const dry = 1.0 - wet\n            outL[i] = srcL[i] * dry + outL[i] * gain * wet\n            outR[i] = srcR[i] * dry + outR[i] * gain * wet\n        }\n        this.#peaks.process(outL, outR, s0, s1)\n        this.#processed = true\n    }\n\n    parameterChanged(parameter: AutomatableParameter): void {\n        if (parameter === this.parameterInputGain) {\n            this.#smoothInputGain.set(dbToGain(this.parameterInputGain.getValue()), this.#processed)\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterOutputGain) {\n            this.#smoothOutputGain.set(dbToGain(this.parameterOutputGain.getValue()), this.#processed)\n        } else if (parameter === this.parameterMix) {\n            this.#smoothMix.set(this.parameterMix.getValue(), this.#processed)\n        }\n    }\n\n    toString(): string {return `{${this.constructor.name} (${this.#id})`}\n}\n", "import {Arrays, asInstanceOf, int, isDefined, Nullable, Option, Terminable, UUID} from \"@opendaw/lib-std\"\nimport {AudioEffectDeviceAdapter, WerkstattDeviceBoxAdapter} from \"../../processing\"\nimport {PeakBroadcaster} from \"../../PeakBroadcaster\"\nimport {AudioEffectDeviceProcessor} from \"../../AudioEffectDeviceProcessor\"\nimport {AudioBuffer} from \"@opendaw/lib-dsp\"\nimport {AudioProcessor} from \"../../AudioProcessor\"\nimport {AutomatableParameter} from \"../../AutomatableParameter\"\n\nconst HEADER_PATTERN = /^\\/\\/ @werkstatt (\\w+) (\\d+) (\\d+)\\n/\nconst MAX_AMPLITUDE = 1000.0 // ~60dB\n\nconst parseUpdate = (code: string): int => {\n    const match = code.match(HEADER_PATTERN)\n    return match !== null ? parseInt(match[3]) : -1\n}\n\nconst validateOutput = (channels: ReadonlyArray<Float32Array>, s0: int, s1: int): Nullable<string> => {\n    for (let ch = 0; ch < channels.length; ch++) {\n        const channel = channels[ch]\n        for (let i = s0; i < s1; i++) {\n            const sample = channel[i]\n            if (sample !== sample) {return `NaN detected in output channel ${ch} at sample ${i}`}\n            if (sample > MAX_AMPLITUDE || sample < -MAX_AMPLITUDE) {\n                return `Signal overflow in channel ${ch} at sample ${i} (amplitude: ${sample.toFixed(1)})`\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    return null\n}\n\ninterface UserIO {\n    src: ReadonlyArray<Float32Array>\n    out: ReadonlyArray<Float32Array>\n}\n\ninterface UserProcessor {\n    process(io: UserIO, block: Block): void\n    paramChanged?(label: string, value: number): void\n}\n\nexport class WerkstattDeviceProcessor extends AudioProcessor implements AudioEffectDeviceProcessor {\n    static ID: int = 0 | 0\n\n    readonly #id: int = WerkstattDeviceProcessor.ID++\n\n    readonly #adapter: WerkstattDeviceBoxAdapter\n    readonly #engineToClient: EngineContext[\"engineToClient\"]\n    readonly #output: AudioBuffer\n    readonly #peaks: PeakBroadcaster\n    readonly #uuid: string\n    readonly #boundParameters: Array<AutomatableParameter<number>>\n\n    #source: Option<AudioBuffer> = Option.None\n    #userProcessor: Option<UserProcessor> = Option.None\n    #currentUpdate: int = -1\n    #pendingUpdate: int = -1\n    #silenced: boolean = false\n    readonly #io: {src: [Float32Array, Float32Array], out: [Float32Array, Float32Array]}\n\n    constructor(context: EngineContext, adapter: WerkstattDeviceBoxAdapter) {\n        super(context)\n        this.#adapter = adapter\n        this.#engineToClient = context.engineToClient\n        this.#output = new AudioBuffer()\n        this.#peaks = this.own(new PeakBroadcaster(context.broadcaster, adapter.address))\n        this.#uuid = UUID.toString(adapter.uuid)\n        this.#boundParameters = []\n        this.#io = {\n            src: [this.#output.getChannel(0), this.#output.getChannel(1)],\n            out: [this.#output.getChannel(0), this.#output.getChannel(1)]\n        }\n        const {parameters, box} = adapter\n        this.ownAll(\n            box.code.catchupAndSubscribe(owner => {\n                const newUpdate = parseUpdate(owner.getValue())\n                if (newUpdate > 0 && newUpdate !== this.#currentUpdate) {\n                    this.#silenced = true\n                    this.#pendingUpdate = newUpdate\n                    this.#userProcessor = Option.None\n                    this.#output.clear()\n                    this.#tryLoad(newUpdate)\n                }\n            }),\n            box.parameters.pointerHub.catchupAndSubscribe({\n                onAdded: (({box}) => {\n                    const paramBox = asInstanceOf(box, WerkstattParameterBox)\n                    const bound = this.bindParameter(parameters.parameterAt(paramBox.value.address))\n                    this.#boundParameters.push(bound)\n                    this.parameterChanged(bound)\n                }),\n                onRemoved: (({box}) => {\n                    const paramBox = asInstanceOf(box, WerkstattParameterBox)\n                    Arrays.removeIf(this.#boundParameters, parameter =>\n                        parameter.address === paramBox.value.address)\n                })\n            }),\n            context.registerProcessor(this),\n            context.audioOutputBufferRegistry.register(adapter.address, this.#output, this.outgoing)\n        )\n        this.readAllParameters()\n    }\n\n    #tryLoad(expectedUpdate: int): void {\n        const registry = (globalThis as any).openDAW?.werkstattProcessors?.[this.#uuid]\n        if (isDefined(registry) && registry.update === expectedUpdate) {\n            this.#swapProcessor(registry.create, expectedUpdate)\n        }\n    }\n\n    #swapProcessor(ProcessorClass: any, update: int): void {\n        try {\n            this.#userProcessor = Option.wrap(new ProcessorClass() as UserProcessor)\n            this.#currentUpdate = update\n            this.#silenced = false\n            this.#pushAllParameters()\n        } catch (error) {\n            this.#reportError(`Failed to instantiate Processor: ${error}`)\n            this.#silenced = true\n        }\n    }\n\n    #pushAllParameters(): void {\n        this.#userProcessor.ifSome(proc => {\n            if (isDefined(proc.paramChanged)) {\n                for (const bound of this.#boundParameters) {\n                    const paramBox = asInstanceOf(bound.adapter.field.box, WerkstattParameterBox)\n                    proc.paramChanged(paramBox.label.getValue(), bound.getValue())\n                }\n            }\n        })\n    }\n\n    #reportError(message: string): void {\n        this.#engineToClient.deviceMessage(this.#uuid, message)\n    }\n\n    #silence(message: string): void {\n        this.#silenced = true\n        this.#output.clear()\n        this.#reportError(message)\n    }\n\n    parameterChanged(parameter: AutomatableParameter): void {\n        this.#userProcessor.ifSome(proc => {\n            if (isDefined(proc.paramChanged)) {\n                const paramBox = asInstanceOf(parameter.adapter.field.box, WerkstattParameterBox)\n                proc.paramChanged(paramBox.label.getValue(), parameter.getValue())\n            }\n        })\n    }\n\n    get incoming(): Processor {return this}\n    get outgoing(): Processor {return this}\n\n    reset(): void {\n        this.#peaks.clear()\n        this.#output.clear()\n        this.eventInput.clear()\n    }\n\n    get uuid(): UUID.Bytes {return this.#adapter.uuid}\n    get audioOutput(): AudioBuffer {return this.#output}\n\n    setAudioSource(source: AudioBuffer): Terminable {\n        this.#source = Option.wrap(source)\n        return {terminate: () => this.#source = Option.None}\n    }\n\n    index(): int {return this.#adapter.indexField.getValue()}\n    adapter(): AudioEffectDeviceAdapter {return this.#adapter}\n\n    processAudio(block: Block): void {\n        if (this.#silenced) {\n            if (this.#pendingUpdate > 0 && this.#pendingUpdate !== this.#currentUpdate) {\n                this.#tryLoad(this.#pendingUpdate)\n            }\n            if (this.#silenced) {return}\n        }\n        if (this.#source.isEmpty() || this.#userProcessor.isEmpty()) {return}\n        const source = this.#source.unwrap()\n        const proc = this.#userProcessor.unwrap()\n        this.#io.src[0] = source.getChannel(0)\n note.pitch > 127) {return `Pitch out of range: ${note.pitch} (must be 0\u2013127)`}\n    if (typeof note.velocity !== \"number\" || note.velocity !== note.velocity) {return `Invalid velocity: ${note.velocity}`}\n    if (note.velocity < 0 || note.velocity > 1) {return `Velocity out of range: ${note.velocity} (must be 0\u20131)`}\n    if (typeof note.duration !== \"number\" || note.duration !== note.duration) {return `Invalid duration: ${note.duration}`}\n    if (note.duration <= 0) {return `Duration must be positive: ${note.duration}`}\n    if (typeof note.position !== \"number\" || note.position !== note.position) {return `Invalid position: ${note.position}`}\n    if (note.position < from) {return `Position ${note.position} is in the past (block starts at ${from})`}\n    return null\n}\n\nexport class SpielwerkDeviceProcessor extends EventProcessor implements MidiEffectProcessor {\n    readonly #adapter: SpielwerkDeviceBoxAdapter\n    readonly #engineToClient: string\n    readonly #boundParameters: Array<AutomatableParameter<number>>\n\n    readonly #events: Array<UserEvent> = []\n    readonly #userBlock: {from: ppqn, to: ppqn, bpm: number, s0: int, s1: #currentUpdate: int = -1\n    #pendingUpdate: int = -1\n    #silenced: boolean = false\n    #wasPlaying: boolean = false\n\n    constructor(context: EngineContext, adapter: SpielwerkDeviceBoxAdapter) this.#tryLoad(newUpdate)\n                }\n            }),\n            box.parameters.pointerHub.catchupAndSubscribe({\n                onAdded: (({box}) => {\n                    const paramBox = context.registerProcessor(this)\n        )\n        this.readAllParameters()\n    }\n\n    get uuid(): UUID.Bytes {return this.#adapter.uuid}\n    get incoming(): Processor {return this}\n    get processNotes(from: ppqn, to: ppqn, flags: int): IterableIterator<NoteLifecycleEvent> {\n        const playing = Bits.every(flags, BlockFlag.transporting | BlockFlag.playing)\n        if (this.#retainer.nonEmpty()) {\n            if (Bits.every(flags, BlockFlag.discontinuous) || (this.#wasPlaying && !playing)) {\n                for (const event of this.#retainer.releaseAll()) {\n                    yield NoteLifecycleEvent.stop(event, from)\n                }\n                Arrays.clear(this.#scheduled)\n                this.#sourceToOutput.clear()\n                this.#userProcessor.ifSome(proc => {\n                    if (isDefined(proc.reset)) {proc.reset()}\n                })\n            } else {\n                for (const event of this.#retainer.releaseLinearCompleted(to)) {\n                    yield NoteLifecycleEvent.stop(event, event.position + event.duration)\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        this.#wasPlaying = playing\n        if (this.#silenced) {\n            if (this.#pendingUpdate > 0 && this.#pendingUpdate !== this.#currentUpdate) {\n                this.#tryLoad(this.#pendingUpdate)\n            }\n        }\n        if (this.#source.nonEmpty() && this.#userProcessor.nonEmpty() && !this.#silenced) {\n            const source = this.#source.unwrap()\n            const proc = this.#userProcessor.unwrap()\n            this.#events.length = 0\n            for (const event of source.processNotes(from, to, flags)) {\n                if (NoteLifecycleEvent.isStart(event)) {\n                    this.#events.push({\n                        gate: true,\n                        id: event.id,\n                        position: event.position,\n                        duration: event.duration,\n                        pitch: event.pitch,\n                        velocity: event.velocity,\n                        cent: event.cent\n                    })\n                } else {\n                    for (const outputId of this.#sourceToOutput.get(event.id)) {\n                        for (const released of this.#retainer.release(note => note.id === outputId)) {\n                            yield NoteLifecycleEvent.stop(released, event.position)\n                        }\n                    }\n                    this.#sourceToOutput.removeKey(event.id)\n                    this.#events.push({\n                        gate: false,\n                        id: event.id,\n                        position: event.position,\n                        pitch: event.pitch\n                    })\n                }\n            }\n            for (let i = this.#scheduled.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n                const note = this.#scheduled[i]\n                if (note.position >= from && note.position < to) {\n                    this.#scheduled.splice(i, 1)\n                    yield* this.#emitNote(note)\n                }\n            }\n            let currentSourceId: int = -1\n            const events = this.#events\n            const trackedEvents: Iterable<UserEvent> = {\n                [Symbol.iterator](): Iterator<UserEvent> {\n                    let index = 0\n                    return {\n                        next(): IteratorResult<UserEvent> {\n                            if (index >= events.length) {\n                                currentSourceId = -1\n                                return {done: true, value: undefined}\n                            }\n          }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            this.#userBlock.from = from\n            this.#userBlock.to = to\n            this.#userBlock.flags = flags\n                     this.#silence(`Note flood: exceeded ${MAX_NOTES_PER_BLOCK} notes per block`)\n                        return\n                    }\n                    const error = validateNote(yielded, from)\n                    if (isNotNull(error)) {\n                        this.#silence(error)\n                        return\n                    }\n                    if (yielded.position >= to) {\n                        if (this.#scheduled.length >= MAX_SCHEDULED_NOTES) {\n                            this.#silence(`Scheduler full: exceeded ${MAX_SCHEDULED_NOTES} scheduled notes`)\n                            return\n                        }\n                        this.#scheduled.push({\n                            position: yielded.position,\n 0\n                        })\n                    } else {\n                        yield* this.#emitNote(yielded, currentSourceId >= 0 ? currentSourceId : undefined)\n                    }\n                }\n            } catch (err) {\n                this.#silence(`Runtime error: ${err}`)\n                return\n            }\n            for (const event of this.#retainer.releaseLinearCompleted(to)) {\n                yield NoteLifecycleEvent.stop(event, event.position + event.duration)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    * iterateActiveNotesAt(position: ppqn, _onlyExternal: boolean): IterableIterator<NoteEvent> {\n        yield* this.#retainer.overlapping(position, NoteEvent.Comparator)\n    }\n\n    reset(): void {\n ppqn): void {}\n\n    parameterChanged(parameter: AutomatableParameter): void {\n        this.#userProcessor.ifSome(proc => {\n            if (isDefined(proc.paramChanged)) {\n                const paramBox = asInstanceOf(parameter.adapter.field.box, WerkstattParameterBox)\n                proc.paramChanged(paramBox.label.getValue(), parameter.getValue())\n            }\n        })\n    }\n\n    handleEvent(_block: Block, _event: Event): void {}\n\n    index(): number {return this.#adapter.indexField.getValue()}\n    adapter(): SpielwerkDeviceBoxAdapter {return this.#adapter}\n\n {\n            this.#swapProcessor(registry.create, expectedUpdate)\n        }\n    }\n\n    #swapProcessor(ProcessorClass: any, update: int): void {\n        try {\n            this.#userProcessor = Option.wrap(new ProcessorClass() as UserProcessor)\n            this.#currentUpdate = update\n            this.#silenced = false\n            this.#pushAllParameters()\n        } catch (error) {\n this.#sourceToOutput.clear()\n        this.#reportError(message)\n    }\n\n    * #emitNote(note: ScheduledNote, sourceId?: int): IterableIterator<NoteLifecycleEvent> {\n        const lifecycle = int): Nullable<string> => {\n    for (let ch = 0; ch < channels.length; ch++) {\n        const channel = channels[ch]\n        for (let i = s0; i < s1; i++) {\n            const sample = channel[i]\n            if (sample !== sample) {return `NaN detected in output channel ${ch} at sample ${i}`}\n            if (sample > MAX_AMPLITUDE || sample < -MAX_AMPLITUDE) {\n                return `Signal overflow in channel ${ch} at sample ${i} (amplitude: ${sample.toFixed(1)})`\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    return null\n}\n\ninterface UserProcessor {\n    process(output: ApparatDeviceBoxAdapter) {\n        super(context)\n        this.#adapter = adapter\n        this.#engineToClient = context.engineToClient\n        this.#noteEventInstrument = new this.#peakBroadcaster = this.own(new PeakBroadcaster(context.broadcaster, adapter.address))\n        this.#uuid = UUID.toString(adapter.uuid)\n        this.#boundParameters = []\n        const {parameters, box} = adapter\n        this.ownAll(\n            box.enabled.catchupAndSubscribe(owner => {\n                this.#enabled = owner.getValue()\n                if (!this.#enabled) {this.reset()}\n            }),\n            box.code.catchupAndSubscribe(owner => {\n                const newUpdate = parseUpdate(owner.getValue())\n                if (newUpdate > 0 && newUpdate !== this.#currentUpdate) {\n                    this.#silenced = true\n                    this.#pendingUpdate = newUpdate\n                    this.#userProcessor = Option.None\n                    this.#audioOutput.clear()\n                    this.#tryLoad(newUpdate)\n                }\n            }),\n            box.parameters.pointerHub.catchupAndSubscribe({\n                onAdded: asInstanceOf(box, WerkstattParameterBox)\n                    Arrays.removeIf(this.#boundParameters, parameter =>\n                        parameter.address === paramBox.value.address)\n                })\n            }),\n            box.samples.pointerHub.catchupAndSubscribe({\n                onAdded: (({box: sampleBox}) => {\n                    const sample = asInstanceOf(sampleBox, loader: Option.None,\n                        lifecycle: Terminable.Empty\n                    }\n                    this.#sampleSlots.set(label, slot)\n                    slot.lifecycle = sample.file.catchupAndSubscribe(pointer => {\n                        const target = pointer.targetVertex.unwrapOrNull()\n                        if (target === null) {\n                            slot.loader = Option.None\n                        } else {\n                            slot.loader = Option.wrap(context.sampleManager.getOrCreate(target.box.address.uuid))\n                        }\n                    })\n                }),\n                onRemoved: (({box: sampleBox}) => {\n                    const sample = asInstanceOf(sampleBox, WerkstattSampleBox)\n                    const label = sample.label.getValue()\n                    const entry = this.#sampleSlots.get(label)\n                    if (isDefined(entry)) {\n                        entry.lifecycle.terminate()\n                        this.#sampleSlots.delete(label)\n                    }\n                    this.#updateSampleData(label, null)\n                })\n            }),\n            context.registerProcessor(this),\n            context.audioOutputBufferRegistry.register(adapter.address, this.#audioOutput, this.outgoing)\n        )\n        this.readAllParameters()\n    }\n\n    get noteEventTarget(): Option<NoteEventTarget & DeviceProcessor> {return Option.wrap(this)}\n    introduceBlock(block: Block): void {this.#noteEventInstrument.introduceBlock(block)}\n    setNoteEventSource(source: NoteEventSource): Terminable {return this.#noteEventInstrument.setNoteEventSource(source)}\n    get incoming(): Processor {return this}\n    get outgoing(): Processor {return this}\n    get uuid(): UUID.Bytes {return this.#adapter.uuid}\n    get audioOutput(): AudioBuffer {return this.#audioOutput}\n\n    reset(): void {\n        this.#noteEventInstrument.clear()\n        this.#peakBroadcaster.clear()\n        this.#audioOutput.clear()\n        this.eventInput.clear()\n        this.#userProcessor.ifSome(proc => {\n            if (isDefined(proc.reset)) {proc.reset()}\n        })\n    }\n\n    handleEvent(event: Event): void {\n        if (this.#silenced || this.#userProcessor.isEmpty()) {return}\n        const proc = this.#userProcessor.unwrap()\n        if (NoteLifecycleEvent.isStart(event)) {\n            if (isDefined(proc.noteOn)) {\n                proc.noteOn(event.pitch, event.velocity, event.cent, event.id)\n            }\n        } else if (NoteLifecycleEvent.isStop(event)) {\n            if (isDefined(proc.noteOff)) {\n                proc.noteOff(event.id)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    processAudio(block: Block): void {\n        if (!this.#enabled) {return}\n        if (this.#silenced) {\n            if (this.#pendingUpdate > 0 && this.#pendingUpdate !== this.#currentUpdate) {\n                this.#tryLoad(this.#pendingUpdate)\n            }\n            if (this.#silenced) {return}\n        }\n        if (this.#userProcessor.isEmpty()) {return}\n        const proc = this.#userProcessor.unwrap()\n        this.#pollSamples(proc)\n        const outL = this.#audioOutput.getChannel(0)\n        const outR = this.#audioOutput.getChannel(1)\n        outL.fill(0.0, block.s0, block.s1)\n        outR.fill(0.0, block.s0, block.s1)\n        try {\n            proc.process([outL, outR], block)\n        } catch (error) {\n            this.#silence(`Runtime error: ${error}`)\n            return\n        }\n        const error = validateOutput([outL, outR], block.s0, block.s1)\n        if (isNotNull(error)) {\n            this.#silence(error)\n            this.#audioOutput.clear(block.s0, block.s1)\n            return\n        }\n        this.#limiter.replace(this.#audioOutput, block.s0, block.s1)\n    }\n\n    finishProcess(): void {\n        this.#peakBroadcaster.process(\n            this.#audioOutput.getChannel(0),\n            this.#audioOutput.getChannel(1), 0, 128)\n    }\n\n    parameterChanged(parameter: AutomatableParameter): void {\n        this.#userProcessor.ifSome(proc => {\n            if (isDefined(proc.paramChanged)) {\n                const paramBox = asInstanceOf(parameter.adapter.field.box, WerkstattParameterBox)\n                proc.paramChanged(paramBox.label.getValue(), parameter.getValue())\n            }\n        })\n    }\n\n    processEvents(_block: Block): void {}\n\n    #tryLoad(expectedUpdate: int): void {\n        const registry = (globalThis as any).openDAW?.apparatProcessors?.[this.#uuid]\n        if (isDefined(registry) && registry.update === expectedUpdate) {\n            this.#swapProcessor(registry.create, expectedUpdate)\n        }\n    }\n\n    #swapProcessor(ProcessorClass: any, update: int): void {\n        try {\n            const proc = new ProcessorClass() as UserProcessor\n            proc.samples = {}\n            for (const [label] of this.#sampleSlots) {\n this.#pushAllParameters()\n            this.#pollSamples(proc)\n        } catch (error) {\n            this.#silence(`Failed to instantiate Processor: ${error}`)\n        }\n    }\n\n    #pushAllParameters(): void {\n        this.#userProcessor.ifSome(proc => {\n            if (isDefined(proc.paramChanged)) {\n                for (const bound of this.#boundParameters) {\n }\n        })\n    }\n\n    #pollSamples(proc: UserProcessor): void {\n        for (const [label, slot] of this.#sampleSlots) {\n            slot.loader.ifSome(loader => {\n                const data new SoundfontDeviceProcessor(context, context.boxAdapters.adapterFor(box, SoundfontDeviceBoxAdapter)),\n            visitMIDIOutputDeviceBox: (box: MIDIOutputDeviceBox) =>\n                new
